---
title: "Data analysis"
author: "Mikaella Kontopoulou"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  rmdformats::readthedown:
    self_contained: true
    thumbnails: true
    number_sections: true
    code_folding: show 
    css: "styles.css"
---
# Import
## Load Packages
```{r load-packages}
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(png)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(grid)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(Gviz)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(grid)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(ggh4x)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(dplyr)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(readr)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(tidyr)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(readxl)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(cowplot)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(ggupset)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(ggrepel)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(ggplot2)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(stringr)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(ggthemr)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(IRanges)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(forcats)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(RMariaDB)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(gridExtra)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(patchwork)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(tidyverse)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(extrafont)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(Biostrings)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(ggalluvial)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(BiocManager)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(rtracklayer)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(GenomicRanges)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(GenomicFeatures)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(VariantAnnotation)))
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(library(BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38)))

windowsFonts(Arial = windowsFont("Arial"))
```

## Load data
```{r load-data, warning = FALSE}
Data <- read.csv("Data.csv") %>%
        dplyr::select(-Strand) %>%
        filter(Gene != "βLCR") %>%
        filter(Gene != "HS40") %>%
        distinct()
```

## Load ClinVar variants
```{r load-clinvar}
Chromosome <- c(11, 11, 11, 16, 16, 16, 11, 11, 11, 16)
Start <- c(5225464, 5232838, 5248269, 152644, 172876, 176680, 5253188, 5268345, 5270791, 106756)
End   <- c(5227071, 5234483, 5249857, 154503, 173710, 177522, 5254781, 5269945, 5292315, 116059)

ClinVar <- list()

for (x in seq_along(Chromosome)) {Query <- readVcf("ClinVar/clinvar.vcf.gz", 
                                                   genome = "hg38", 
                                                   param = GRanges(seqnames = Chromosome[x],
                                                                   ranges = IRanges(start = Start[x], 
                                                                                    end = End[x])))
                                  Variants <- as.data.frame(rowRanges(Query))  
                                  
                                  Variants <- Variants[rep(seq_len(nrow(Variants)), elementNROWS(alt(Query))), ]
                                  Variants$Alt <- unlist(lapply(alt(Query), as.character), use.names = FALSE)
                                  
                                  ReviewStatus <- info(Query)$CLNREVSTAT
                                  
                                  ReviewStatus <- lapply(ReviewStatus,
                                                         function(x) paste(unique(as.character(x)), collapse = ";"))
ReviewStatus <- unlist(ReviewStatus, use.names = FALSE)
                                  
                                  Variants <- Variants %>%
                                              mutate(Chromosome = Chromosome[x],
                                                     Start = as.numeric(start),
                                                     Ref = as.character(REF),
                                                     End = as.numeric(Start) + (str_count(Ref, "[A-Za-z]") - 1),
                                                     ClinVar = unlist(info(Query)$CLNSIG, use.names = FALSE),
                                                     ReviewStatus = ReviewStatus) %>%
                                              mutate(Gene = ifelse(Start >= 5225464 & End <= 5227071 & Chromosome == 11, "HBB",
                                                            ifelse(Start >= 5232838 & End <= 5234483 & Chromosome == 11, "HBD",
                                                            ifelse(Start >= 5248269 & End <= 5249857 & Chromosome == 11, "HBG1",
                                                            ifelse(Start >= 152644 & End <= 154503 & Chromosome == 16, "HBZ",
                                                            ifelse(Start >= 172876 & End <= 173710 & Chromosome == 16, "HBA2",
                                                            ifelse(Start >= 176680 & End <= 177522 & Chromosome == 16, "HBA1",
                                                            ifelse(Start >= 5253188 & End <= 5254781 & Chromosome == 11, "HBG2",
                                                            ifelse(Start >= 5268345 & End <= 5269945 & Chromosome == 11, "HBE1", NA))))))))) %>%
                                              dplyr::select(Chromosome, Gene, Start, End, Ref, Alt, ClinVar, ReviewStatus) %>%
                                              filter(!is.na(Gene)) 
                                  
                                  ClinVar[[length(ClinVar) + 1]] <- Variants}

ClinVar <- do.call(rbind, ClinVar) %>%
           distinct() %>%
           mutate(Stars = ifelse(ReviewStatus == "criteria_provided;_multiple_submitters;_no_conflicts", 2, 
                          ifelse(ReviewStatus == "criteria_provided;_conflicting_classifications", 1,
                          ifelse(ReviewStatus == "criteria_provided;_single_submitter", 1,
                          ifelse(ReviewStatus == "no_classification_for_the_single_variant", 0,
                          ifelse(ReviewStatus == "no_assertion_criteria_provided", 0,
                          ifelse(ReviewStatus == "no_classification_provided", 0, NA))))))) %>%
           dplyr::select(-ReviewStatus)

rm(Chromosome, Start, End, Query, Variants, x)
```

### Add ClinVar IDs to GnomAD variants
```{r clinvar-id, warning = FALSE}
Data <- Data %>% 
        filter(Gene != "Non-target genes or intergenic regions") %>%
        left_join(ClinVar, by = c("Chromosome", "Gene", "Start", "End", "Ref", "Alt")) %>% 
        distinct() %>%
        relocate(ClinVar, Stars, .after = Alt)
```

### Determine variants unique to ClinVar [comparison to gnomADv4.1 Joint]
```{r clinvar-unique}
ClinVar <- ClinVar %>%
           mutate(ID = paste(Chromosome, Start, End, Ref, Alt, sep = "_")) %>%
           filter(!(ID %in% unique((Data %>%
                                    mutate(ID = paste(Chromosome, Start, End, Ref, Alt, sep = "_")) %>%
                                    filter(Version == "GnomADv4.1" & Region == "Joint"))$ID))) %>%
           mutate(Version = "GnomADv4.1",
                  Region = "Joint") %>%
           dplyr::select(Version, Region, Chromosome, Gene, Start, End, Ref, Alt, ClinVar, Stars)

nrow(ClinVar)
```

## Load visualization configurations
```{r config}
#font_import(pattern = "arial")
suppressMessages(suppressWarnings(loadfonts()))

ggthemr("dust", spacing = 2, layout = "scientific")

LeftGutter <- function(p) {g <- ggplotGrob(p) 
                           panel_idx <- grep("^panel", g$layout$name)
                           stopifnot(length(panel_idx) > 0)
                           panel_l <- min(g$layout$l[panel_idx])
                           sum(g$widths[seq_len(panel_l - 1)])}

LeftPadding <- function(p, target) {g <- ggplotGrob(p)
                                    panel_idx <- grep("^panel", g$layout$name)
                                    stopifnot(length(panel_idx) > 0)
                                    panel_l <- min(g$layout$l[panel_idx])
                                    cur <- sum(g$widths[seq_len(panel_l - 1)])
                                    diff <- target - cur
                                    if (convertWidth(diff, "mm", valueOnly = TRUE) > 0) {g$widths[1] <- g$widths[1] + diff}
                                    wrap_elements(full = g)}
```

## Load gene locations
```{r gene-info}
if(file.exists("genes.sqlite"))
  {genes <- AnnotationDbi::loadDb("genes.sqlite")} else 
  {genes <- GenomicFeatures::makeTxDbFromEnsembl(port = 3306,
                                                 release = 111,
                                                 circ_seqs = NULL,
                                                 password = NULL,
                                                 username = "anonymous",
                                                 organism = "Homo sapiens",
                                                 tx_attrib = "gencode_basic",
                                                 server = "ensembldb.ensembl.org")
  
  AnnotationDbi::saveDb(genes, file = "genes.sqlite")

  genes_info <- as.list(genes)

  genes_info$transcripts <- as.data.frame((as_tibble(genes_info$transcripts) %>%
                            dplyr::filter(tx_name %in% c("ENST00000252951", "ENST00000251595",
                                                         "ENST00000336906", "ENST00000320868", "ENST00000396895",
                                                         "ENST00000330597", "ENST00000650601", "ENST00000335295"))))
                        
  genes_info$splicings <- as.data.frame((as_tibble(genes_info$splicings) %>%
                          dplyr::filter(tx_id %in% (genes_info$transcripts %>% as_tibble() %>% .[['tx_id']]))))
  
  genes_info$genes <- as.data.frame((as_tibble(genes_info$genes) %>%
                      dplyr::filter(tx_id %in% (genes_info$transcripts %>% as_tibble() %>% .[['tx_id']]))))

  genes_info$chrominfo <- as.data.frame((as_tibble(genes_info$chrominfo) %>%
                          dplyr::filter(chrom %in% (genes_info$transcripts %>% as_tibble() %>% .[['tx_chrom']]))))

  genes <- do.call(makeTxDb, genes_info)

  AnnotationDbi::saveDb(genes, file = "genes.sqlite")}
```

# Figure 1
## Panel A: Variant quantity & quality overview across GnomAD versions & sequencing datasets
```{r 1A}
Data <- Data %>%
        mutate(Version = ifelse(Version == "GnomADv4.1", "gnomADv4.1",
                         ifelse(Version == "GnomADv2.0", "gnomADv2.1.1", NA)))

Fig1a <- Data %>%
         mutate(ID = paste(Chromosome, Start, Ref, Alt, sep = "_"),
                Region = factor(Region, levels = c("Exome", "Genome", "Joint")),
                Version = factor(Version, levels = c("gnomADv2.1.1", "gnomADv4.1")),
                Quality = ifelse(Quality == "Passed", "Pass", "Fail"),
                Quality = factor(Quality, levels = c("Pass", "Fail"))) %>%
         dplyr::select(ID, Version, Region, Quality) %>%
         group_by(Version, Region, Quality) %>%
         summarise(Count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
         group_by(Version, Region) %>%
         mutate(Total = sum(Count),
                Percent = round(Count / Total * 100, 1)) %>%
         ungroup()

Fig1a

Fig1A <- Fig1a %>% 
         ggplot(aes(x = Region, y = Percent, fill = Quality)) +  
         geom_col(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"), width = 0.9) +
         facet_wrap(~ Version, strip.position = "top", scales = "free_x") +
         scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
         scale_fill_manual(values = alpha(c("Pass" = "#35B779",
                                            "Fail" = "#440154"), 0.7)) +
         geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(is.nan(Percent), paste0(Count, "\n(0%)"), paste0(Count, "\n(", sprintf("%.1f", Percent), "%)"))), 
                   position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"),
                   vjust = -0.5, 
                   size = 3.5, 
                   family = "Arial") +
         guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1, title.position = "top", title.hjust = 0.5)) +
         labs(fill = "Quality assessment",
              x = "Sequencing dataset",
              y = "Percentage of variants (%)") +
         theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial", base_size = 14) +
         theme(text = element_text(color = "black"),
               legend.position = "bottom",
               plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12),
               plot.caption = element_text(size = 11.8, margin = margin(t = 6)),
               strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               legend.text = element_text(size = 11.8),
               legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.text = element_text(size = 11.8),
               axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               panel.grid.major = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey80"),
               panel.grid.minor = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey90"),
               panel.spacing = unit(4, "lines"),
               strip.placement = "inside",
               strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#F6F6F5", colour = "white"))

Fig1A
```

## Panel B: Variant novelty & quality assesment changes across GnomAD versions
```{r 1B}
Fig1b <- Data %>%
         filter(Region != "Joint") %>%
         mutate(ID = paste(Chromosome, Start, Ref, Alt, sep = "_"),
                Region = factor(Region, levels = c("Exome", "Genome")),
                Version = factor(Version, levels = c("gnomADv2.1.1", "gnomADv4.1")),
                Quality = ifelse(Quality == "Passed", "Pass", "Fail"),
                Quality = factor(Quality, levels = c("Pass", "Fail"))) %>%
         dplyr::select(ID, Version, Region, Quality) %>%
         pivot_wider(names_from = Version,
                     values_from = Quality,
                     names_prefix = "Q_",
                     values_fn = list(Quality = dplyr::first),
                     values_fill = list(Quality = NA_character_)) %>%
         mutate(Category = case_when(!is.na(Q_gnomADv2.1.1) & !is.na(Q_gnomADv4.1) ~ "Common to both releases",
                                     !is.na(Q_gnomADv2.1.1) &  is.na(Q_gnomADv4.1) ~ "Unique to gnomADv2.1.1",
                                     is.na(Q_gnomADv2.1.1) & !is.na(Q_gnomADv4.1) ~ "Unique to gnomADv4.1"),
                Quality = case_when(Category == "Common to both releases" & Q_gnomADv2.1.1 == "Pass" & Q_gnomADv4.1 == "Pass" ~ "Pass",
                                    Category == "Common to both releases" & Q_gnomADv2.1.1 == "Fail" & Q_gnomADv4.1 == "Fail" ~ "Fail",
                                    Category == "Common to both releases" & Q_gnomADv2.1.1 == "Pass" & Q_gnomADv4.1 == "Fail" ~ "Pass → Fail",
                                    Category == "Common to both releases" & Q_gnomADv2.1.1 == "Fail" & Q_gnomADv4.1 == "Pass" ~ "Fail → Pass",
                                    Category == "Unique to gnomADv2.1.1" & Q_gnomADv2.1.1 == "Pass" ~ "Pass",
                                    Category == "Unique to gnomADv2.1.1" & Q_gnomADv2.1.1 == "Fail" ~ "Fail",
                                    Category == "Unique to gnomADv4.1" & Q_gnomADv4.1 == "Pass" ~ "Pass",
                                    Category == "Unique to gnomADv4.1" & Q_gnomADv4.1 == "Fail" ~ "Fail", TRUE ~ "Other")) %>%
         filter(Quality != "Other") %>%      
         group_by(Category, Quality) %>%
         summarise(Count = n(), .groups = "drop_last") %>%
         mutate(Percent = round(Count / sum(Count) * 100, 1),
                Quality = factor(Quality, levels = c("Pass", "Fail → Pass", "Pass → Fail", "Fail")),
                Category = factor(Category, levels = c("Common to both releases", "Unique to gnomADv2.1.1", "Unique to gnomADv4.1"))) %>%
         ungroup()

Fig1b

Fig1B <- Fig1b %>%
         ggplot(aes(x = Category, y = Percent, fill = Quality)) +
         geom_col(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"), width = 0.9) +
         scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
         scale_fill_manual(values = alpha(c("Pass" = "#35B779",
                                            "Fail → Pass" = "#73D055",
                                            "Pass → Fail" = "#2A788E", 
                                            "Fail" = "#440154"), 0.7)) +
         geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(is.nan(Percent), paste0(Count, "\n(0%)"), paste0(Count, "\n(", sprintf("%.1f", Percent), "%)")), group = Quality), 
                   position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"),
                   vjust = -0.5, 
                   size = 3.5, 
                   family = "Arial") +
         guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1,
                                    title.position = "top",
                                    title.hjust = 0.5)) +
         labs(fill = "Quality assessment",
              x = "Variant membership in gnomAD releases",
              y = "Percentage of variants (%)") +
         theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial", base_size = 14) +
         theme(text = element_text(color = "black"),
               legend.position = "bottom",
               plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,
                                         face  = "bold",
                                         size  = 12),
               plot.caption = element_text(size  = 11.8,
                                           margin = margin(t = 6)),
               strip.text = element_text(face = "bold",
                                         size = 11.8),
               legend.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               panel.grid.major = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey80"),
               panel.grid.minor = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey90"),
               panel.spacing = unit(4, "lines"),
               strip.placement = "inside",
               strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#F6F6F5", colour = "white"))

Fig1B
```

## Panel C: gnomADv4.1 release variant spread & quality assesment changes across sequencing datasets
```{r 1C}
Fig1c <- Data %>%
         filter(Version == "gnomADv4.1") %>%
         mutate(ID = paste(Chromosome, Start, Ref, Alt, sep = "_"),
                Quality_orig = ifelse(Quality == "Passed", "Pass", "Fail")) %>%
         dplyr::select(ID, Region, Quality_orig) %>%
         pivot_wider(names_from = Region,
                     values_from = Quality_orig,
                     values_fn = list(Quality_orig = dplyr::first),
                     values_fill = NA_character_) %>%
         mutate(Quality = case_when(Genome == "Pass" & Exome == "Pass" & Joint == "Pass" ~ "Pass",
                                    is.na(Genome) & Exome == "Pass" & Joint == "Pass" ~ "Pass",
                                    Genome == "Pass" & is.na(Exome) & Joint == "Pass" ~ "Pass",
                                    Genome == "Fail" & Exome == "Fail" & Joint == "Fail" ~ "Fail",
                                    is.na(Genome) & Exome == "Fail" & Joint == "Fail" ~ "Fail",
                                    Genome == "Fail" & is.na(Exome) & Joint == "Fail" ~ "Fail",
                                    (Genome == "Pass" | Exome == "Pass") & Joint == "Fail" ~ "Pass → Fail",
                                    (Genome == "Fail" | Exome == "Fail") & Joint == "Pass" ~ "Fail → Pass",
                                    is.na(Genome) & is.na(Exome) & Joint == "Pass" ~ "Pass",  
                                    is.na(Genome) & is.na(Exome) & Joint == "Fail" ~ "Fail", TRUE ~ NA_character_)) %>%
         filter(!is.na(Quality)) %>%
         rowwise() %>%
         mutate(Regions = list(c(if(!is.na(Genome)) "Genome" else NULL,
                                 if(!is.na(Exome)) "Exome" else NULL,
                                 if(!is.na(Joint)) "Joint" else NULL))) %>%
         ungroup() %>%
         filter(lengths(Regions) > 0) %>%  
         dplyr::select(ID, Regions, Quality) %>%
         group_by(Regions, Quality) %>%
         summarise(Count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
         group_by(Regions) %>%
         mutate(Total = sum(Count),   
                Percent = round(Count / Total * 100, 1),
                Quality = factor(Quality, levels = c("Pass", "Fail → Pass", "Pass → Fail", "Fail"))) %>%
         ungroup()

Fig1c

Fig1C <- ggplot(Fig1c, aes(x = Regions, y = Percent, fill = Quality)) +
         geom_col(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"), width = 0.9, 
                  show.legend = TRUE) +
         geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(is.nan(Percent), paste0(Count, "\n(0%)"), paste0(Count, "\n(", sprintf("%.1f", Percent), "%)")), fill = Quality),
                   position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"),
                   vjust = -0.5, 
                   size = 3.5,
                   family = "Arial") +
         scale_x_upset() +
         scale_fill_manual(values = alpha(c("Pass" = "#35B779",
                                            "Fail → Pass" = "#73D055",
                                            "Pass → Fail" = "#2A788E", 
                                            "Fail" = "#440154"), 0.7),   drop = FALSE) +
         guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1, title.position = "top", title.hjust = 0.5)) +
         labs(fill = "Quality assessment",
              x = "Sequencing dataset interactions",
              y = "Percentage of variants (%)") +
         theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial", base_size = 14) +
         theme(text = element_text(color = "black"),
               legend.position = "bottom",
               plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 12),
               plot.caption = element_text(size = 11.8, margin = margin(t = 6)),
               strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               legend.text = element_text(size = 11.8),
               legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.text = element_text(size = 11.8),
               axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               panel.grid.major = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey80"),
               panel.grid.minor = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey90"),
               panel.spacing = unit(4, "lines"),
               strip.placement = "inside",
               strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#F6F6F5", colour = "white"))

Fig1C

G2 <- Data %>% filter(Version == "gnomADv2.1.1" & Region == "Genome") %>% nrow()
E2 <- Data %>% filter(Version == "gnomADv2.1.1" & Region == "Exome") %>% nrow()
G4 <- Data %>% filter(Version == "gnomADv4.1" & Region == "Genome") %>% nrow()
E4 <- Data %>% filter(Version == "gnomADv4.1" & Region == "Exome") %>% nrow()
J4 <- Data %>% filter(Version == "gnomADv4.1" & Region == "Joint") %>% nrow()

G2P <- Data %>% filter(Version == "gnomADv2.1.1" & Region == "Genome" & Quality == "Passed") %>% nrow()
E2P <- Data %>% filter(Version == "gnomADv2.1.1" & Region == "Exome" & Quality == "Passed") %>% nrow()
G4P <- Data %>% filter(Version == "gnomADv4.1" & Region == "Genome" & Quality == "Passed") %>% nrow()
E4P <- Data %>% filter(Version == "gnomADv4.1" & Region == "Exome" & Quality == "Passed") %>% nrow()
J4P <- Data %>% filter(Version == "gnomADv4.1" & Region == "Joint" & Quality == "Passed") %>% nrow()

paste0("Total variants in v2.1.1 Genome: ", G2, " of which ", G2P, " passed QC (", round(G2P/G2*100, 2), "%).")
paste0("Total variants in v2.1.1 Exome: ", E2, " of which ", E2P, " passed QC (", round(E2P/E2*100, 2), "%).")

paste0("Total variants in v2.1.1: ", G2+E2, " of which ", G2P+E2P, " passed QC (", round(((G2P+E2P)/(G2+E2))*100, 2), "%).")

paste0("Total variants in v4.1 Genome: ", G4, " of which ", G4P, " passed QC (", round(G4P/G4*100, 2), "%).")
paste0("Total variants in v4.1 Exome: ", E4, " of which ", E4P, " passed QC (", round(E4P/E4*100, 2), "%).")
paste0("Total variants in v4.1 Joint: ", J4, " of which ", J4P, " passed QC (", round(J4P/J4*100, 2), "%).")

paste0("Total variants in v4.1: ", G4+E4, " of which ", G4P+E4P, " passed QC (", round(((G4P+E4P)/(G4+E4))*100, 2), "%).")

paste0("Percentage of all Genome and Exome variants shared with Joint with altered QC ", round(((Fig1c %>% filter(Quality == "Pass → Fail"))$Count / sum((Fig1c %>% filter(Regions != "Joint"))$Count)), 3) * 100, "%")

rm(G2, E2, G4, E4, J4, G2P, E2P, G4P, E4P, J4P)
```

## Compile Figure 1
```{r Fig1}
Fig1A <- Fig1A + 
         theme(legend.position = "none",
               plot.margin = margin(1, 2, 10, 2),
               panel.spacing = unit(0.8, "lines")) + 
         coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100), clip = "off") +
         scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15)))

Fig1B <- Fig1B +
         theme(legend.position = "none",
               plot.margin = margin(10, 1, 10, 2)) + 
         coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100), clip = "off") +
         scale_x_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2)))

Fig1C <- Fig1C + 
         theme(plot.margin = margin(10, 2, 2, 2)) +
         scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.4)))

Fig1 <- ggdraw() +
        draw_grob(patchwork::patchworkGrob((Fig1A / Fig1B / Fig1C) +
                  plot_layout(ncol = 1, heights = c(1, 1, 1)))) +
        draw_label("A", x = 0.01, y = 0.995, hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 16) +
        draw_label("B", x = 0.01, y = 0.73, hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 16) +
        draw_label("C", x = 0.01, y = 0.46, hjust = 0, vjust = 1, size = 16)
Fig1

ggsave(filename = "Fig1.png",
       plot = Fig1, units = "in", dpi = 300,
       width = 8.77, height = 9.5)
```

# Figure 2
## Panel A: Spread of gnomADv4.1 release variants passing quality check across genes
```{r 2A}
Fig2a <- Data %>%
         filter(Version == "gnomADv4.1" & Region == "Joint" & Quality == "Passed") %>%
         mutate(ID = paste(Chromosome, Start, Ref, Alt, sep = "_")) %>%
         dplyr::select(ID, Gene) %>%
         group_by(Gene) %>%
         summarise(Count = n(), .groups = "drop") %>%
         mutate(Total = sum(Count),
                Percent = round(Count / Total * 100, 1))

Fig2a

Fig2A <- Fig2a %>%
         ggplot(aes(x = Gene, y = Count)) +
         geom_col(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"), 
                  width = 0.9,
                  fill = "grey80",  
                  colour = "black") +
         scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
         geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(is.nan(Percent), paste0(Count, "\n(0%)"), paste0(Count, "\n(", sprintf("%.1f", Percent), "%)"))), 
                   position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"),
                   vjust = -0.5, 
                   size = 3.5, 
                   family = "Arial") +
         guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1), 
                color = "none") +
         labs(x = "Gene",
              y = "Number of variants") +
         theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial", base_size = 14) +
         theme(text = element_text(color = "black"),
               legend.position = "bottom",
               plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,
                                         face  = "bold",
                                         size  = 12),
               plot.caption = element_text(size  = 11.8,
                                           margin = margin(t = 6)),
               strip.text = element_text(face = "bold",
                                         size = 11.8),
               legend.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               panel.grid.major = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey80"),
               panel.grid.minor = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey90"),
               panel.spacing = unit(4, "lines"),
               strip.placement = "inside",
               strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#F6F6F5", colour = "white"))

Fig2A
```

## Panel B: gnomADv4.1 release variants passing quality check that are unique to a single genetic ancestry group

**Genetic ancestry groups:**
 * **ALL:** Global
 * **FIN:** Finnish European
 * **NFE:** Non-Finnish European
 * **AMR:** Admixed American
 * **MID:** Middle Eastern
 * **ASJ:** Ashkenazi Jewish
 * **EAS:** East Asian
 * **SAS:** South Asian
 * **AFR:** African/African American
 * **AMI:** Amish
 * **OTH:** Remaining individuals that cannot be clustered into any of the above ethnic groups using Principal Component Analysis (PCA)
```{r 2B}
Total <- Data %>% 
         filter(Version == "gnomADv4.1" & Region == "Joint" & Quality == "Passed") %>% 
         nrow()

Total2 <- Data %>% 
          filter(Version == "gnomADv4.1" & Region == "Joint" & Quality == "Passed") %>%
          dplyr::select(Chromosome, Gene, Start, End, Ref, Alt, Allele.Count_AFR, Allele.Count_AMI, 
                                Allele.Count_AMR, Allele.Count_ASJ, Allele.Count_EAS, Allele.Count_FIN, 
                                Allele.Count_MID, Allele.Count_NFE, Allele.Count_SAS, Allele.Count_OTH) %>%
          pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("Allele.Count_"),
                       names_to = "Ancestry",
                       names_prefix = "Allele.Count_",
                       values_to = "Allele_Count") %>%
          filter(Allele_Count != 0 & !is.na(Allele_Count)) %>%
          group_by(Ancestry) %>%
          mutate(Total2 = n()) %>%
          ungroup() %>%
          dplyr::select(Ancestry, Total2) %>%
          distinct()

Fig2b <- Data %>% 
         filter(Version == "gnomADv4.1" & Region == "Joint" & Quality == "Passed") %>%
         dplyr::select(Chromosome, Gene, Start, End, Ref, Alt, Allele.Count_AFR, Allele.Count_AMI, 
                               Allele.Count_AMR, Allele.Count_ASJ, Allele.Count_EAS, Allele.Count_FIN, 
                               Allele.Count_MID, Allele.Count_NFE, Allele.Count_SAS, Allele.Count_OTH) %>%
         pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("Allele.Count_"),
                      names_to = "Ancestry",
                      names_prefix = "Allele.Count_",
                      values_to = "Allele_Count") %>%
         filter(Allele_Count != 0 & !is.na(Allele_Count)) %>%
         mutate(ID = paste(Chromosome, Start, Ref, Alt, sep = "_")) %>%
         group_by(ID) %>%
         mutate(Count = n()) %>%
         ungroup() %>%
         filter(Count == 1) %>%
         dplyr::select(Chromosome, Start, End, Ref, Alt, Ancestry, Count) %>%
         group_by(Ancestry) %>%
         summarise(Count = n(), .groups = "drop_last") %>%
         complete(Ancestry = c("AFR", "AMI", "AMR", "ASJ", "EAS", "FIN", "MID", "NFE", "OTH", "SAS"), 
                  fill = list(Count = 0)) %>% 
         mutate(Percent = round(Count / Total * 100, 1),
                Ancestry = factor(Ancestry, levels = c("NFE", "SAS", "AFR", "FIN", "OTH", 
                                                       "AMR", "EAS", "ASJ", "MID", "AMI"))) %>%
         ungroup() %>%
         left_join(Total2, by = "Ancestry") %>%
         mutate(Percent2 = round(Count / Total2 * 100, 1),
                Percent2 = ifelse(is.nan(Percent2) | is.na(Percent2), 0, Percent2))

Fig2b

Fig2ba <- Fig2b %>%
          transmute(Ancestry, panel = "Number of variants",
                    y = Count,
                    label = ifelse(is.nan(Percent), paste0(Count, "\n(0%)"), paste0(Count, "\n(", sprintf("%.1f", Percent), "%)"))) %>%
          mutate(panel = factor(panel, levels = c("Number of variants", "Exclusive within ancestry (%)")))

Fig2bb <- Fig2b %>%
          transmute(Ancestry, panel = "Exclusive within ancestry (%)",
                    y = Percent2,
                    label = ifelse(is.nan(Percent2), paste0(Count, "\n(0%)"), paste0(sprintf("%.1f", Percent2), "%"))) %>%
          mutate(panel = factor(panel, levels = c("Number of variants", "Exclusive within ancestry (%)")))

Fig2B <- ggplot() +
         geom_col(data = Fig2ba,
                  aes(x = Ancestry, y = y),
                  width = 0.9, fill = "grey80", colour = "black") +
         geom_text(data = Fig2ba,
                   aes(x = Ancestry, y = y, label = label),
                   vjust = -0.5, size = 3.5, family = "Arial") +
         geom_segment(data = Fig2bb,
                      aes(x = Ancestry, xend = Ancestry, y = 0, yend = y),
                      linewidth = 1, color = "black") +
         geom_point(data = Fig2bb,
                    aes(x = Ancestry, y = y),
                    size = 3.5, shape = 21, fill = "black", color = "black", stroke = 0.8) +
         geom_text(data = Fig2bb,
                   aes(x = Ancestry, y = y, label = label),
                   vjust = -0.8, size = 3.5, family = "Arial") +
         facet_grid2(panel ~ ., scales = "free_y", switch = "y",
                     labeller = labeller(panel = c("Number of variants" = "Number of variants",
                                                   "Exclusive within ancestry (%)" = "Exclusive within \nancestry (%)")),
                     strip = strip_themed(text_y = list(element_text(face = "bold", size = 12, vjust = 0),  
                                                        element_text(face = "plain", size = 11.8, 
                                                                     hjust = 1, angle = 360, vjust = 0.4)))) +
         scale_x_discrete(limits = c("NFE", "SAS", "AFR", "FIN", "OTH", "AMR", "EAS", "ASJ", "MID", "AMI"), 
                          drop = FALSE, expand = c(0, 0)) +
         scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
         labs(x = "Genetic ancestry", y = NULL) +
         coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
         theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial", base_size = 14) +
         theme(text = element_text(color = "black"),
               legend.position = "bottom",
               plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,
                                         face  = "bold",
                                         size  = 12),
               plot.caption = element_text(size  = 11.8,
                                           margin = margin(t = 6)),
               strip.text.x.top = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               strip.text.x.bottom = element_text(face = "plain", size = 2.5),
               legend.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               panel.grid.major = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey80"),
               panel.grid.minor = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey90"),
               panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines"),
               strip.placement = "outside",
               strip.background = element_blank()) +
         force_panelsizes(rows = unit(c(3, 1), "null"), respect = FALSE)

Fig2B

rm(Total, Total2, Fig2ba, Fig2bb)
```

## Panel C: Spread of gnomADv4.1 release variants passing quality check across databases
```{r Fig2C}
CI <- ClinVar %>% 
      mutate(Database = "ClinVar")%>%
      dplyr::select(Chromosome, Gene, Start, End, Ref, Alt, ClinVar, Stars, Database)

Fig2c <- Data %>% 
         filter(Region == "Joint" & Quality == "Passed" & Version == "gnomADv4.1") %>%
         dplyr::select(Chromosome, Gene, Start, End, Ref, Alt, ClinVar, Stars) %>%
         mutate(Database = ifelse(!is.na(ClinVar), "gnomAD + ClinVar",       
                           ifelse(is.na(ClinVar), "gnomAD", NA))) %>%
         rbind(CI) %>%
         mutate(ID = paste(Chromosome, Start, Ref, Alt, sep = "_")) %>%
         dplyr::select(ID, Database) %>%
         group_by(Database) %>%
         summarise(Count = n(), .groups = "drop_last") %>%
         mutate(Percent = round(Count / sum(Count) * 100, 1),
                Database = factor(Database, levels = c("ClinVar", "gnomAD", "gnomAD + ClinVar"))) %>%
         ungroup()

Fig2c

Fig2C <- Fig2c %>%
         ggplot(aes(x = Database, y = Count)) +
         geom_col(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"), 
                  width = 0.9,
                  fill = "grey80",  
                  colour = "black") +
         scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0), labels = scales::label_wrap(15)) +
         geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(is.nan(Percent), paste0(Count, "\n(0%)"), paste0(Count, "\n(", sprintf("%.1f", Percent), "%)"))), 
                   position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"),
                   vjust = -0.5, 
                   size = 3.5, 
                   family = "Arial") +
         guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1), 
                color = "none") +
         labs(x = "Membership in variant databases",
              y = "Number of variants") +
         theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial", base_size = 14) +
         theme(text = element_text(color = "black"),
               legend.position = "bottom",
               plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,
                                         face  = "bold",
                                         size  = 12),
               plot.caption = element_text(size  = 11.8,
                                           margin = margin(t = 6)),
               strip.text = element_text(face = "bold",
                                         size = 11.8),
               legend.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               panel.grid.major = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey80"),
               panel.grid.minor = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey90"),
               panel.spacing = unit(4, "lines"),
               strip.placement = "inside",
               strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#F6F6F5", colour = "white"))

Fig2C

rm(ClinVar, CI)
```

## Compile Figure 2
```{r Fig2}
Fig2A <- Fig2A + 
         theme(plot.margin = margin(1, 1, 10, 1)) + 
         coord_cartesian(clip = "off") + 
         scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.6)))

Fig2B <- Fig2B +
         theme(plot.margin = margin(10, 1, 10, 1)) + 
         coord_cartesian(clip = "off") + 
         scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.6)))

Fig2C <- Fig2C + 
         theme(plot.margin = margin(10, 1, 2, 1), axis.text = element_text(vjust = 0)) +
         coord_cartesian(clip = "off") + 
         scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.5)))

Target <- Reduce(function(a, b) unit.pmax(a, b), 
                 list(LeftGutter(Fig2A), LeftGutter(Fig2B), LeftGutter(Fig2C)))

Fig2 <- (LeftPadding(Fig2A, Target) /
         LeftPadding(Fig2B, Target) /
         LeftPadding(Fig2C, Target)) +
         plot_layout(ncol = 1, heights = c(1, 1.5, 1), guides = "collect") +
         plot_annotation(tag_levels = list(c("A","B","C")),
                         theme = theme(plot.tag = element_text(family = "Arial", face = "bold", size = 16),
                                       plot.margin = margin(1, 2, 1, 2)))

Fig2

ggsave(filename = "Fig2.png",
       plot = Fig2, units = "in", dpi = 300,
       width = 8.77, height = 9.5)

rm(LeftGutter, LeftPadding)
```

# Figure 3: Gene constraint score comparisons across gnomAD releases
```{r Fig3}
Fig3 <- read_xlsx("gnomad_gene_constraint_scores.xlsx") %>%
        pivot_longer(cols = c("Synonymous z-score", "Missense z-score", "LOEUF"),
                     names_to = "Type", values_to = "Score") %>%
        mutate(Version = ifelse(Version == "GnomADv4.1", "gnomADv4.1",
                         ifelse(Version == "GnomADv2.0", "gnomADv2.1.1", NA)))

Fig3

Fig3A <- Fig3 %>%
         filter(Type == "Synonymous z-score") %>%
         ggplot(aes(x = Gene, y = Score, fill = Version)) +
         geom_col(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"), width = 0.9) +
         scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
         scale_fill_manual(values = alpha(c("gnomADv4.1" = "#35B779",
                                            "gnomADv2.1.1" = "#440154"), 0.7)) +
         geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Score == 0, paste0("0"), paste0(sprintf("%.2f", Score))), group = Version, 
                       vjust = ifelse(Score >= 0, -0.5, 1.2)), 
                   position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"),
                   size = 3.5, 
                   family = "Arial") +
         guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1,
                                    title.position = "top",
                                    title.hjust = 0.5)) +
         labs(fill = "gnomAD release",
              x = "Gene",
              y = "Synonymous z-score") +
         theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial", base_size = 14) +
         theme(text = element_text(color = "black"),
               legend.position = "bottom",
               plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,
                                         face  = "bold",
                                         size  = 12),
               plot.caption = element_text(size  = 11.8,
                                           margin = margin(t = 6)),
               strip.text = element_text(face = "bold",
                                         size = 11.8),
               legend.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               panel.grid.major = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey80"),
               panel.grid.minor = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey90"),
               panel.spacing = unit(4, "lines"),
               strip.placement = "inside",
               strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#F6F6F5", colour = "white")) + ylim(-4, 2.3)

Fig3A

Fig3B <- Fig3 %>%
         filter(Type == "Missense z-score") %>%
         ggplot(aes(x = Gene, y = Score, fill = Version)) +
         geom_col(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"), width = 0.9) +
         scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
         scale_fill_manual(values = alpha(c("gnomADv4.1" = "#35B779",
                                            "gnomADv2.1.1" = "#440154"), 0.7)) +
         geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Score == 0, paste0("0"), paste0(sprintf("%.2f", Score))), group = Version, 
                       vjust = ifelse(Score >= 0, -0.5, 1.2)), 
                   position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"),
                   size = 3.5, 
                   family = "Arial") +
         guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1,
                                    title.position = "top",
                                    title.hjust = 0.5)) +
         labs(fill = "gnomAD release",
              x = "Gene",
              y = "Missense z-score") +
         theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial", base_size = 14) +
         theme(text = element_text(color = "black"),
               legend.position = "bottom",
               plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,
                                         face  = "bold",
                                         size  = 12),
               plot.caption = element_text(size  = 11.8,
                                           margin = margin(t = 6)),
               strip.text = element_text(face = "bold",
                                         size = 11.8),
               legend.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               panel.grid.major = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey80"),
               panel.grid.minor = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey90"),
               panel.spacing = unit(4, "lines"),
               strip.placement = "inside",
               strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#F6F6F5", colour = "white")) + ylim(-4, 2.3)

Fig3B

Fig3C <- Fig3 %>%
         filter(Type == "LOEUF") %>%
         ggplot(aes(x = Gene, y = Score, fill = Version)) +
         geom_col(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"), width = 0.9) +
         scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
         scale_fill_manual(values = alpha(c("gnomADv4.1" = "#35B779",
                                            "gnomADv2.1.1" = "#440154"), 0.7)) +
         geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Score == 0, paste0("0"), paste0(sprintf("%.2f", Score))), group = Version, 
                       vjust = ifelse(Score >= 0, -0.5, 1.2)), 
                   position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"),
                   size = 3.5, 
                   family = "Arial") +
         guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1,
                                    title.position = "top",
                                    title.hjust = 0.5)) +
         labs(fill = "gnomAD release",
              x = "Gene",
              y = "LOEUF score") +
         theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial", base_size = 14) +
         theme(text = element_text(color = "black"),
               legend.position = "bottom",
               plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,
                                         face  = "bold",
                                         size  = 12),
               plot.caption = element_text(size  = 11.8,
                                           margin = margin(t = 6)),
               strip.text = element_text(face = "bold",
                                         size = 11.8),
               legend.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               panel.grid.major = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey80"),
               panel.grid.minor = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey90"),
               panel.spacing = unit(4, "lines"),
               strip.placement = "inside",
               strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#F6F6F5", colour = "white"))

Fig3C

Fig3A <- Fig3A +          
         theme(plot.margin = margin(1, 1, 10, 2)) + 
         coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

Fig3B <- Fig3B + 
         theme(plot.margin = margin(10, 1, 10, 2)) + 
         coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

Fig3C <- Fig3C + 
         theme(plot.margin = margin(10, 1, 2, 2)) + 
         coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

Fig3 <- (Fig3C / Fig3B / Fig3A) +
         plot_layout(ncol = 1, guides = "collect", heights = c(1, 1, 1)) +
         plot_annotation(tag_levels = list(c("A", "B", "C")),
                         tag_prefix = "",
                         tag_suffix = "",
                         theme = theme(plot.tag = element_text(family = "Arial",
                                                               face = "bold", 
                                                               size = 16))) &
         theme(legend.position = "bottom", 
               legend.direction = "horizontal",
               legend.box = "horizontal",
               legend.margin = margin(t = 2),
               legend.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
               legend.text = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

paste0("Positive values reflect increased intolerance to variation, whereas negative values reflect increased tolerance.")

Fig3

ggsave(filename = "Fig3.png",
       plot = Fig3, units = "in", dpi = 300,
       width = 8.77, height = 9.5)
```

# Figure 4 
## Data preparation
```{r Fig4prep}
# GnomAD v4.1
Data1 <- Data %>% 
         filter(Region == "Joint" & Version == "gnomADv4.1" & Quality == "Passed") %>%
         rowwise() %>%
         mutate(FAF95_MAX = max(c(FAF95_AFR, 
                                  FAF95_AMR, 
                                  FAF95_EAS, 
                                  FAF95_NFE, 
                                  FAF95_SAS), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
         mutate(FAF95_MAXETH = {Index <- which(c(FAF95_AFR, 
                                                 FAF95_AMR, 
                                                 FAF95_EAS, 
                                                 FAF95_NFE, 
                                                 FAF95_SAS) == max(c(FAF95_AFR, 
                                                                     FAF95_AMR,
                                                                     FAF95_EAS, 
                                                                     FAF95_NFE, 
                                                                     FAF95_SAS), na.rm = TRUE))
         
                                if (length(Index) == 1) {c("AFR", "AMR", "EAS", "NFE", "SAS")[Index]} 
         
                                # In cases of tied max FAF95, report FAF95 with greatest variant count
                                else {Index2 <- Index[which(c(Allele.Count_AFR,
                                                              Allele.Count_AMR, 
                                                              Allele.Count_EAS, 
                                                              Allele.Count_NFE, 
                                                              Allele.Count_SAS)[Index] == max(c(Allele.Count_AFR,
                                                                                                Allele.Count_AMR,
                                                                                                Allele.Count_EAS,
                                                                                                Allele.Count_NFE, 
                                                                                                Allele.Count_SAS)[Index], na.rm = TRUE))]
                                
                                      if (length(Index2) == 1) {c("AFR", "AMR", "EAS", "NFE", "SAS")[Index2]} 
                                
                                      # In cases of tied max FAF95 & allele count, report FAF95 with greatest number of alleles tested
                                      else {Max <- max(c(Allele.Total_AFR,
                                                         Allele.Total_AMR, 
                                                         Allele.Total_EAS, 
                                                         Allele.Total_NFE, 
                                                         Allele.Total_SAS)[Index2], na.rm = TRUE)
                                      
                                            c("AFR",
                                              "AMR",
                                              "EAS",
                                              "NFE", 
                                              "SAS")[Index2[which.max(c(Allele.Total_AFR, 
                                                                        Allele.Total_AMR, 
                                                                        Allele.Total_EAS,
                                                                        Allele.Total_NFE,
                                                                        Allele.Total_SAS)[Index2])]]}}}) %>%
         ungroup() %>%
         mutate(Count = case_when(FAF95_MAXETH == "AFR" ~ Allele.Count_AFR,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "AMR" ~ Allele.Count_AMR,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "EAS" ~ Allele.Count_EAS,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "NFE" ~ Allele.Count_NFE,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "SAS" ~ Allele.Count_SAS,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "MID" ~ Allele.Count_MID,
                                  TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
                Total = case_when(FAF95_MAXETH == "AFR" ~ Allele.Total_AFR,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "AMR" ~ Allele.Total_AMR,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "EAS" ~ Allele.Total_EAS,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "NFE" ~ Allele.Total_NFE,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "SAS" ~ Allele.Total_SAS,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "MID" ~ Allele.Total_MID,
                                  TRUE ~ NA_integer_)) %>% 
         dplyr::select(Chromosome, Gene, Start, End, Ref, Alt, Allele.Frequency_ALL, Homozygotes_ALL, FAF95_MAX, Count, Total, ClinVar, Stars) %>%
         distinct() %>%
         mutate(BA1 = ifelse(Total >= 2000 & Count >= 5 & FAF95_MAX >= 0.005, "Satisfied", "Not satisfied"), # 95% MAX FAF >= 0.005 (0.5%) where allele total >= 2000 & allele count >= 5
                BS1 = ifelse(Total >= 2000 & Count >= 5 & FAF95_MAX >= 0.001 & FAF95_MAX < 0.005, "Satisfied", "Not satisfied"), # 95% MAX FAF >= 0.001 (0.1%) where allele total >= 2000 & allele count >= 5 [Excludes BA1 range]
                PM2_Supporting = ifelse(Allele.Frequency_ALL < 0.0001, "Satisfied", "Not satisfied"),        # ALL AF < 0.0001 (0.01%)
                BS2 = ifelse(Homozygotes_ALL >= 2, "Satisfied", "Not satisfied"),                            # 2 >= Homozygotes
                BS2_Supporting = ifelse(Homozygotes_ALL == 1, "Satisfied", "Not satisfied"),                 # 1 == Homozygote
                Conflict_BS2_PM2 = ifelse(Homozygotes_ALL >= 2 & Allele.Frequency_ALL < 0.0001, "Satisfied", "Not satisfied"), # Meets both criteria [evidence for benign & pathogenic]
                Conflict_BS1_PM2 = ifelse(Total >= 2000 & Count >= 5 & FAF95_MAX >= 0.001 & FAF95_MAX < 0.005 & Allele.Frequency_ALL < 0.0001, "Satisfied", "Not satisfied")) %>% # Meets both criteria [evidence for benign & pathogenic]
         mutate(ClinVar = ifelse(ClinVar == "Uncertain_significance", "Uncertain significance", 
                          ifelse(ClinVar == "Pathogenic/Likely_pathogenic", "Pathogenic/Likely pathogenic", 
                          ifelse(ClinVar == "Likely_benign", "Benign/Likely benign", 
                          ifelse(ClinVar == "Benign/Likely_benign", "Benign/Likely benign", 
                          ifelse(ClinVar == "other", "Uncertain significance", 
                          ifelse(ClinVar == "Likely_pathogenic", "Pathogenic/Likely pathogenic", 
                          ifelse(ClinVar == "Benign", "Benign/Likely benign",
                          ifelse(ClinVar == "Pathogenic|other", "Uncertain significance", 
                          ifelse(ClinVar == "Conflicting_classifications_of_pathogenicity", "Uncertain significance",
                          ifelse(ClinVar == "Pathogenic", "Pathogenic/Likely pathogenic", NA)))))))))))  %>%
         mutate(ID = paste(Chromosome, Start, End, Ref, Alt, sep = "_"))

# GnomAD v2.1.1
Data2 <- Data %>% 
         filter(Version == "gnomADv2.1.1" & Region != "Joint" & Quality == "Passed") %>%
         rowwise() %>%
         mutate(FAF95_MAX = max(c(FAF95_AFR, 
                                  FAF95_AMR, 
                                  FAF95_EAS, 
                                  FAF95_NFE, 
                                  FAF95_SAS), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
         mutate(FAF95_MAXETH = {Index <- which(c(FAF95_AFR, 
                                                 FAF95_AMR, 
                                                 FAF95_EAS, 
                                                 FAF95_NFE, 
                                                 FAF95_SAS) == max(c(FAF95_AFR, 
                                                                     FAF95_AMR,
                                                                     FAF95_EAS, 
                                                                     FAF95_NFE, 
                                                                     FAF95_SAS), na.rm = TRUE))
         
                                if (length(Index) == 1) {c("AFR", "AMR", "EAS", "NFE", "SAS")[Index]} 
         
                                # In cases of tied max FAF95, report FAF95 with greatest variant count
                                else {Index2 <- Index[which(c(Allele.Count_AFR,
                                                              Allele.Count_AMR, 
                                                              Allele.Count_EAS, 
                                                              Allele.Count_NFE, 
                                                              Allele.Count_SAS)[Index] == max(c(Allele.Count_AFR,
                                                                                                Allele.Count_AMR,
                                                                                                Allele.Count_EAS,
                                                                                                Allele.Count_NFE, 
                                                                                                Allele.Count_SAS)[Index], na.rm = TRUE))]
                                
                                      if (length(Index2) == 1) {c("AFR", "AMR", "EAS", "NFE", "SAS")[Index2]} 
                                
                                      # In cases of tied max FAF95 & allele count, report FAF95 with greatest number of alleles tested
                                      else {Max <- max(c(Allele.Total_AFR,
                                                         Allele.Total_AMR, 
                                                         Allele.Total_EAS, 
                                                         Allele.Total_NFE, 
                                                         Allele.Total_SAS)[Index2], na.rm = TRUE)
                                      
                                            c("AFR",
                                              "AMR",
                                              "EAS",
                                              "NFE", 
                                              "SAS")[Index2[which.max(c(Allele.Total_AFR, 
                                                                        Allele.Total_AMR, 
                                                                        Allele.Total_EAS,
                                                                        Allele.Total_NFE,
                                                                        Allele.Total_SAS)[Index2])]]}}}) %>%
         ungroup() %>%
         mutate(Count = case_when(FAF95_MAXETH == "AFR" ~ Allele.Count_AFR,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "AMR" ~ Allele.Count_AMR,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "EAS" ~ Allele.Count_EAS,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "NFE" ~ Allele.Count_NFE,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "SAS" ~ Allele.Count_SAS,
                                  TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
                Total = case_when(FAF95_MAXETH == "AFR" ~ Allele.Total_AFR,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "AMR" ~ Allele.Total_AMR,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "EAS" ~ Allele.Total_EAS,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "NFE" ~ Allele.Total_NFE,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "SAS" ~ Allele.Total_SAS,
                                  TRUE ~ NA_integer_)) %>%
         group_by(Chromosome, Gene, Start, Ref, Alt) %>%
         mutate(Allele.Frequency_ALL = max(Allele.Frequency_ALL, na.rm = TRUE),
                Homozygotes_ALL = max(Homozygotes_ALL, na.rm = TRUE),
                FAF95_MAX = max(FAF95_MAX, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
         slice_max(order_by = FAF95_MAX, with_ties = FALSE) %>% 
         ungroup() %>%
         dplyr::select(Chromosome, Gene, Start, End, Ref, Alt, Allele.Frequency_ALL, Homozygotes_ALL, FAF95_MAX, Count, Total, ClinVar, Stars) %>%
         distinct() %>%
         mutate(BA1 = ifelse(Total >= 2000 & Count >= 5 & FAF95_MAX >= 0.005, "Satisfied", "Not satisfied"), # 95% MAX FAF >= 0.005 (0.5%) where allele total >= 2000 & allele count >= 5
                BS1 = ifelse(Total >= 2000 & Count >= 5 & FAF95_MAX >= 0.001 & FAF95_MAX < 0.005, "Satisfied", "Not satisfied"), # 95% MAX FAF >= 0.001 (0.1%) where allele total >= 2000 & allele count >= 5 [Exlcudes BA1 range]
                PM2_Supporting = ifelse(Allele.Frequency_ALL < 0.0001, "Satisfied", "Not satisfied"),        # ALL AF < 0.0001 (0.01%)
                BS2 = ifelse(Homozygotes_ALL >= 2, "Satisfied", "Not satisfied"),                            # 2 >= Homozygotes
                BS2_Supporting = ifelse(Homozygotes_ALL == 1, "Satisfied", "Not satisfied"),                 # 1 == Homozygote
                Conflict_BS2_PM2 = ifelse(Homozygotes_ALL >= 2 & Allele.Frequency_ALL < 0.0001, "Satisfied", "Not satisfied"), # Meets both criteria [evidence for benign & pathogenic]
                Conflict_BS1_PM2 = ifelse(Total >= 2000 & Count >= 5 & FAF95_MAX >= 0.001 & FAF95_MAX < 0.005 & Allele.Frequency_ALL < 0.0001, "Satisfied", "Not satisfied")) %>%  # Meets both criteria [evidence for benign & pathogenic]
        mutate(ClinVar = ifelse(ClinVar == "Uncertain_significance", "Uncertain significance", 
                         ifelse(ClinVar == "Pathogenic/Likely_pathogenic", "Pathogenic/Likely pathogenic", 
                         ifelse(ClinVar == "Likely_benign", "Benign/Likely benign", 
                         ifelse(ClinVar == "Benign/Likely_benign", "Benign/Likely benign", 
                         ifelse(ClinVar == "other", "Uncertain significance", 
                         ifelse(ClinVar == "Likely_pathogenic", "Pathogenic/Likely pathogenic", 
                         ifelse(ClinVar == "Benign", "Benign/Likely benign",
                         ifelse(ClinVar == "Pathogenic|other", "Uncertain significance", 
                         ifelse(ClinVar == "Conflicting_classifications_of_pathogenicity", "Uncertain significance",
                         ifelse(ClinVar == "Pathogenic", "Pathogenic/Likely pathogenic", NA))))))))))) %>%
        mutate(ID = paste(Chromosome, Start, End, Ref, Alt, sep = "_")) 
```

## Panel A: Overview of BA1, BS1, BS2, BS2_Supporting and PM2_Supporting evidence across variants passing quality assessment per gnomAD release
```{r Fig4A}
Fig4a <- bind_rows(Data1 %>% mutate(Version = "gnomADv4.1"),
                   Data2 %>% mutate(Version = "gnomADv2.1.1")) %>%
         dplyr::select(ID, Version, BA1, BS1, BS2, BS2_Supporting, PM2_Supporting) %>%
         pivot_longer(cols = c(BA1, BS1, BS2, BS2_Supporting, PM2_Supporting),
                      names_to = "Category",
                      values_to = "Response") %>%
         group_by(Category, Version) %>%
         summarise(Total = n(),
                   Count = sum(Response == "Satisfied"), .groups = "drop") %>%
         mutate(Percent = round(Count / Total * 100, 1),
                Category = factor(Category, levels = c("BA1", "BS1", "BS2", "BS2_Supporting", "PM2_Supporting")))

Fig4a

Fig4A <- ggplot(Fig4a, aes(x = Category, y = Count)) +
         geom_col(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"), 
                  width = 0.9,
                  fill = "grey80",  
                  colour = "black") +
         facet_wrap(~ Version, strip.position = "top", scales = "free_x") +
         scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
         geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(is.nan(Percent), paste0(Count, "\n(0%)"), paste0(Count, "\n(", sprintf("%.1f", Percent), "%)")), group = Version), 
                   position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"),
                   vjust = -0.5, 
                   size = 3.5, 
                   family = "Arial") +

         labs(y = "Number of variants",
              x = "ACMG/AMP variant classification criteria") +
         theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial", base_size = 14) +
         theme(text = element_text(color = "black"),
               legend.position = "bottom",
               plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,
                                         face  = "bold",
                                         size  = 12),
               plot.caption = element_text(size  = 11.8,
                                           margin = margin(t = 6)),
               strip.text = element_text(face = "bold",
                                         size = 11.8),
               legend.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 10.5),
               axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               panel.grid.major = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey80"),
               panel.grid.minor = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey90"),
               panel.spacing = unit(1.5, "lines"),
               strip.placement = "inside",
               strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#F6F6F5", colour = "white"))

Fig4A
```

## Panel B: Overview of variants passing quality assessment satisfying conflicting ACMG/AMP criteria per gnomAD release
```{r Fig4B}
Fig4b <- bind_rows(Data1 %>% mutate(Version = "gnomADv4.1"),
                   Data2 %>% mutate(Version = "gnomADv2.1.1")) %>%
         dplyr::select(ID, Version, Conflict_BS2_PM2, Conflict_BS1_PM2) %>%
         pivot_longer(cols = c(Conflict_BS2_PM2, Conflict_BS1_PM2),
                      names_to = "Category",
                      values_to = "Response") %>%
         group_by(Category, Version) %>%
         summarise(Total = n(),
                   Count = sum(Response == "Satisfied"), .groups = "drop") %>%
         mutate(Percent = round(Count / Total * 100, 1),
                Category = ifelse(Category == "Conflict_BS2_PM2", "BS2 + PM2_Supporting", "BS1 + PM2_Supporting"))

Fig4b

Fig4B <- ggplot(Fig4b, aes(x = Category, y = Count)) +
         geom_col(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"),
                  width = 0.9,
                  fill = "grey80",  
                  colour = "black") +
         facet_wrap(~ Version, strip.position = "top", scales = "free_x") +
         scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
         geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Percent == 0, paste0(Count, "\n(0%)"), paste0(Count, "\n(", sprintf("%.1f", Percent), "%)")), group = Version), 
                   position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"),
                   vjust = -0.5, 
                   size = 3.5, 
                   family = "Arial") +

         labs(y = "Number of variants",
              x = "ACMG/AMP variant classification criteria") +
         theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial", base_size = 14) +
         theme(text = element_text(color = "black"),
               legend.position = "bottom",
               plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,
                                         face  = "bold",
                                         size  = 12),
               plot.caption = element_text(size  = 11.8,
                                           margin = margin(t = 6)),
               strip.text = element_text(face = "bold",
                                         size = 11.8),
               legend.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               panel.grid.major = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey80"),
               panel.grid.minor = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey90"),
               panel.spacing = unit(1.5, "lines"),
               strip.placement = "inside",
               strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#F6F6F5", colour = "white"))

Fig4B
```

## Panel C: Comparison of BA1, BS1, BS2, BS2_Supporting and PM2_Supporting evidence across variants passing quality assessment common to both gnomAD releases
```{r Fig4C}
Fig4c <- bind_rows(Data1 %>% mutate(Version = "gnomADv4.1"),
                   Data2 %>% mutate(Version = "gnomADv2.1.1")) %>%
         dplyr::select(ID, Version, BA1, BS1, BS2, BS2_Supporting, PM2_Supporting) %>%
         pivot_longer(cols = c(BA1, BS1, BS2, BS2_Supporting, PM2_Supporting),
                      names_to = "Category",
                      values_to = "Response") %>%
         pivot_wider(names_from = Version,
                     values_from = Response) %>%
         mutate(Status = case_when(!is.na(`gnomADv2.1.1`) & !is.na(`gnomADv4.1`) ~ "Common to both releases",
                                   is.na(`gnomADv2.1.1`) & !is.na(`gnomADv4.1`) ~ "Unique to gnomADv4.1",
                                   !is.na(`gnomADv2.1.1`) & is.na(`gnomADv4.1`) ~ "Unique to gnomADv2.1.1"),
                Response = case_when(Status != "Common to both releases" ~ NA_character_,
                                     `gnomADv2.1.1` == "Satisfied" & `gnomADv4.1` == "Satisfied" ~ "Satisfied",
                                     `gnomADv2.1.1` == "Not satisfied" & `gnomADv4.1` == "Not satisfied" ~ "Not satisfied",
                                     `gnomADv2.1.1` == "Satisfied" & `gnomADv4.1` == "Not satisfied" ~ "Satisfied → Not satisfied",
                                     `gnomADv2.1.1` == "Not satisfied" & `gnomADv4.1` == "Satisfied" ~ "Not satisfied → Satisfied")) %>%
         filter(Status == "Common to both releases") %>%
         group_by(Category) %>%
         mutate(Total = n()) %>% 
         ungroup() %>%
         filter(Response != "Not satisfied") %>%
         group_by(Category, Response) %>%
         summarise(Count = n(),
                   Total = first(Total), .groups = "drop") %>%
         mutate(Percent = round(Count / Total * 100, 1),
                Response = ifelse(Response == "Satisfied", "Met", 
                           ifelse(Response == "Not satisfied → Satisfied", "Not met → Met", 
                           ifelse(Response == "Satisfied → Not satisfied", "Met → Not met", NA))),
                Response = factor(Response, levels = c("Met", "Not met → Met", "Met → Not met")),
                Category = factor(Category, levels = c("BA1", "BS1", "BS2", "BS2_Supporting", "PM2_Supporting")))

Fig4c

Fig4C <- ggplot(Fig4c, aes(x = Category, y = Count, fill = Response)) +
         geom_col(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"), width = 0.9) +
         scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
         scale_fill_manual(values = alpha(c("Met" = "#35B779",
                                            "Not met → Met" = "#2A788E", 
                                            "Met → Not met" = "#440154"), 0.7)) +
         geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(is.nan(Percent), paste0(Count, "\n(0%)"), paste0(Count, "\n(", sprintf("%.1f", Percent), "%)")), group = Response), 
                   position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"),
                   vjust = -0.5, 
                   size = 3.5, 
                   family = "Arial") +
         guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1,
                                    title.position = "top",
                                    title.hjust = 0.5)) +
         labs(fill = "ACMG/AMP variant classification criteria assessment",
              x = "ACMG/AMP variant classification criteria",
              y = "Number of variants") +
         theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial", base_size = 14) +
         theme(text = element_text(color = "black"),
               legend.position = "bottom",
               plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,
                                         face  = "bold",
                                         size  = 12),
               plot.caption = element_text(size  = 11.8,
                                           margin = margin(t = 6)),
               strip.text = element_text(face = "bold",
                                         size = 11.8),
               legend.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               panel.grid.major = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey80"),
               panel.grid.minor = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey90"),
               panel.spacing = unit(4, "lines"),
               strip.placement = "inside",
               strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#F6F6F5", colour = "white"))

Fig4C
```

## Compile Figure 4
```{r Fig4}
Fig4A <- Fig4A + 
         theme(plot.margin = margin(1, 1, 10, 2)) + 
         coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
         scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.5))) +
         scale_x_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.3))) + 
         scale_x_discrete(labels = function(x) gsub("_", "\n", x))

Fig4B <- Fig4B +
         theme(plot.margin = margin(10, 1, 10, 2)) + 
         coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
         scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.5))) +
         scale_x_discrete(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.3)))

Fig4C <- Fig4C + 
         theme(plot.margin = margin(10, 1, 2, 2)) + 
         coord_cartesian(clip = "off") +
         scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.5)))

Fig4 <- (Fig4A / Fig4B / Fig4C) +
         plot_layout(ncol = 1, guides = "collect", heights = c(1, 1, 1)) +
         plot_annotation(tag_levels = list(c("A","B","C")),
                         theme = theme(plot.tag = element_text(family = "Arial", 
                                                               face = "bold", 
                                                               size = 16),
                                       plot.margin = margin(2.5, 2, 2.5, 2),
                                       legend.position = "bottom"))

Fig4

ggsave(filename = "Fig4.png",
       plot = Fig4, units = "in", dpi = 300,
       width = 8.77, height = 9.5)
```

# Figure 5
## Panel A: Comparison of BA1, BS1, BS2, BS2_Supporting and PM2_Supporting evidence of gnomADv4.1 release variants passing quality assessment across genes
```{r Fig5A}
Fig5a <- Data1 %>% 
         dplyr::select(Gene, BA1, BS1, BS2, BS2_Supporting, PM2_Supporting) %>%
         pivot_longer(cols = c(BA1, BS1, BS2, BS2_Supporting, PM2_Supporting),
                      names_to = "Category", values_to = "Response") %>%
         group_by(Gene, Category) %>%
         mutate(Total = n()) %>%
         ungroup() %>%
         filter(Response == "Satisfied") %>%
         group_by(Gene, Category) %>%
         mutate(Count = n(),
                Percent = round(Count / Total * 100, 1),
                Category = factor(Category, level = c("BA1", "BS1", "BS2", "BS2_Supporting", "PM2_Supporting")),
                Gene = factor(Gene, levels = c("HBZ", "HBG2", "HBG1", "HBE1", "HBD", "HBB", "HBA2", "HBA1"))) %>%
         distinct()

Fig5a

Fig5A <- ggplot(Fig5a, aes(x = Percent, y = Gene)) +
         facet_wrap(~Category, nrow = 1, scales = "free_x") +
         ggh4x::facetted_pos_scales(x = list(Category != "PM2_Supporting" ~ scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 25)),
                                             Category == "PM2_Supporting" ~ scale_x_continuous(limits = c(0, 100),
                                                                                               breaks = seq(0, 100, 25), 
                                                                                               expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.9))))) +
         ggh4x::force_panelsizes(cols = c(1, 1, 1, 1, 1.5)) +
         geom_col(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"),
                  width = 0.9,
                  fill = "grey80",  
                  colour = "black") +
         scale_y_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
         geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Percent == 0, paste0(Count, " (0%)"), paste0(Count, " (", sprintf("%.1f", Percent), "%)")), group = Gene), 
                   position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"),
                   hjust = -0.1,
                   size = 3.3, 
                   family = "Arial") +
         guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1,
                                    title.position = "top",
                                    title.hjust = 0.5)) +
         labs(y = "Gene",
              x = "Percentage of variants (%)") +
         theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial", base_size = 14) +
         theme(text = element_text(color = "black"),
               legend.position = "bottom",
               plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,
                                         face  = "bold",
                                         size  = 12),
               plot.caption = element_text(size  = 11.8,
                                           margin = margin(t = 6)),
               strip.text = element_text(face = "bold",
                                         size = 11.8),
               legend.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
```
