```{r Fig5A}
               axis.text.y  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               axis.text.x  = element_text(size = 9),
               axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               panel.grid.major = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey80"),
               panel.grid.minor = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey90"),
               panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "lines"),
               strip.placement = "inside",
               strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#F6F6F5", colour = "white")) 

Fig5A
```

## Panel B: Comparison of BA1, BS1, BS2, PM2_Supporting & grey/conflicting evidence of gnomADv4.1 release variants passing quality assessment with Clinvar annotations
```{r Fig5B}
Fig5b <- Data1 %>%
         dplyr::select(ClinVar, BA1, BS1, BS2, BS2_Supporting, PM2_Supporting) %>%
         pivot_longer(cols = c(BA1, BS1, BS2, BS2_Supporting, PM2_Supporting),
                      names_to = "Category", values_to = "Response") %>%
         group_by(Category) %>%
         mutate(Total = n()) %>%
         ungroup() %>%
         filter(Response == "Satisfied" & !is.na(ClinVar)) %>%
         group_by(ClinVar, Category) %>%
         mutate(Count = n(),
                Percent = round(Count / Total * 100, 1),
                Percent = ifelse(Percent == 0, round(Count / Total * 100, 2), Percent),
                Category = factor(Category, level = c("BA1", "BS1", "BS2", "BS2_Supporting", "PM2_Supporting")),
                ClinVar = factor(ClinVar, level = c("Benign/Likely benign", "Uncertain significance", "Pathogenic/Likely pathogenic"))) %>%
         distinct()

Fig5b

Fig5B <- Fig5b %>%
         ggplot(aes(x = Category, y = Count, fill = ClinVar)) +
         geom_col(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"), 
                  width = 0.9) +
         scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
         scale_fill_manual(values = alpha(c("Benign/Likely benign" = "#35B779",
                                            "Uncertain significance" = "#2A788E", 
                                            "Pathogenic/Likely pathogenic" = "#440154"), 0.7)) +
         geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Percent == 0, paste0(Count, "\n(0%)"), paste0(Count, "\n(", sprintf("%.1f", Percent), "%)")), group = ClinVar), 
                   position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"),
                   vjust = -0.5,
                   size = 3.5,
                   family = "Arial") +
         guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1,
                                    title.position = "top",
                                    title.hjust = 0.5)) +
         labs(fill = "ClinVar variant classification",
              x = "ACMG/AMP variant classification criteria",
              y = "Number of variants") +
         theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial") +
         theme(text = element_text(color = "black"),
               legend.position = "bottom",
               plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,
                                         face  = "bold",
                                         size  = 12),
               plot.caption = element_text(size  = 11.8,
                                           margin = margin(t = 6)),
               strip.text = element_text(face = "bold",
                                         size = 11.8),
               legend.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               panel.grid.major = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey80"),
               panel.grid.minor = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey90"),
               panel.spacing = unit(1.5, "lines"),
               strip.placement = "inside",
               strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#F6F6F5", colour = "white"))

Fig5B
```

## Panel C: Review status of ClinVar annotations for gnomADv4.1 release variants passing quality assessment with PM2_Supporting evidence
```{r Fig5C}
Fig5c <- Data1 %>%
         dplyr::select(ClinVar, Stars, PM2_Supporting) %>%
         pivot_longer(cols = c(PM2_Supporting),
                      names_to = "Category", values_to = "Response") %>%
         filter(Category == "PM2_Supporting") %>%
         mutate(Total = n()) %>%
         filter(Response == "Satisfied" & !is.na(ClinVar)) %>%
         group_by(ClinVar, Stars, Category) %>%
         mutate(Count = n(),
                Percent = round(Count / Total * 100, 1),
                Percent = ifelse(Percent == 0, round(Count / Total * 100, 2), Percent),
                Category = factor(Category, level = c("PM2_Supporting")),
                ClinVar = factor(ClinVar, level = c("Benign/Likely benign", "Uncertain significance", "Pathogenic/Likely pathogenic")),
                Stars = factor(Stars, levels = c(0, 1, 2, 3, 4), labels = c("None", "*", "**", "***", "****"))) %>%
         distinct()

Fig5c

Fig5C <- Fig5c %>%
         ggplot(aes(x = ClinVar, y = Count, fill = Stars)) +
         geom_col(position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"), 
                  width = 0.9) +
         scale_x_discrete(expand = c(0, 0)) +
         scale_fill_manual(values = alpha(c("None" = "#35B779",
                                            "*" = "#2A788E", 
                                            "**" = "#440154"), 0.7)) +
         geom_text(aes(label = ifelse(Percent == 0, paste0(Count, "\n(0%)"), paste0(Count, "\n(", sprintf("%.1f", Percent), "%)")), group = Stars), 
                   position = position_dodge2(width = 0.9, padding = 0.1, preserve = "single"),
                   vjust = -0.5,
                   size = 3.5,
                   family = "Arial") +
         guides(fill = guide_legend(nrow = 1,
                                    title.position = "top",
                                    title.hjust = 0.5)) +
         labs(fill = "Review status on submitted ClinVar variant classification records",
              x = "ClinVar variant classification",
              y = "Number of variants") +
         theme_minimal(base_family = "Arial") +
         theme(text = element_text(color = "black"),
               legend.position = "bottom",
               plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5,
                                         face  = "bold",
                                         size  = 12),
               plot.caption = element_text(size  = 11.8,
                                           margin = margin(t = 6)),
               strip.text = element_text(face = "bold",
                                         size = 11.8),
               legend.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               legend.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.text  = element_text(size = 11.8),
               axis.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11.8),
               axis.title.x = element_text(margin = margin(t = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               axis.title.y = element_text(margin = margin(r = 10), hjust = 0.5),
               panel.grid.major = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey80"),
               panel.grid.minor = element_line(linetype = "dotted", color = "grey90"),
               panel.spacing = unit(1.5, "lines"),
               strip.placement = "inside",
               strip.background = element_rect(fill = "#F6F6F5", colour = "white"))

Fig5C
```

## Compile Figure 5
```{r Fig5}
Fig5A <- Fig5A + 
         theme(plot.margin = margin(1, 1, 10, 2)) +
         coord_cartesian(clip = "off")

Fig5B <- Fig5B +
         theme(plot.margin = margin(10, 1, 2, 2)) + 
         coord_cartesian(clip = "off") + 
         scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.5)))

Fig5C <- Fig5C + 
         theme(plot.margin = margin(20, 1, 2, 2)) + 
         coord_cartesian(clip = "off") + 
         scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.5)))

Fig5 <- (Fig5A / Fig5B / Fig5C) +
         plot_layout(ncol = 1, heights = c(1, 1, 1)) +
         plot_annotation(tag_levels = list(c("A","B","C")),
                         theme = theme(plot.tag = element_text(family = "Arial", 
                                                               face = "bold", 
                                                               size = 16),
                                       plot.margin = margin(2.5, 2, 2.5, 2),
                                       legend.position = "bottom"))

Fig5

ggsave(filename = "Fig5.png",
       plot = Fig5, units = "in", dpi = 300,
       width = 8.77, height = 9.5)

rm(Data2)
```

# Supplementary Figure 1: Distribution of gnomADv4.1 release variants failing/pasing quality assessment across loci
```{r Fig6}
Genes <- unlist(GRangesList((unlist(GRangesList(lapply((exonsBy(genes, "tx", use.names = TRUE)), function(x){unlist(tile(x, width = 3))})))), 
                            (unlist(GRangesList(lapply((intronsByTranscript(genes, use.names = TRUE)), function(x){unlist(tile(x, width = 5))}))))))

strand(Genes) <- "*"
options(ucscChromosomeNames = FALSE)

C11 <- GenomeAxisTrack(col = "black", lwd = 1, fontcolor = "black", showTitle = TRUE, name = "Chr 11", fontsize = 14, labelPos = "revAlternating",  
                       fontface = "plain", fontface.title = "plain", background.title = "transparent", add35 = TRUE)
C16 <- GenomeAxisTrack(col = "black", lwd = 1, fontcolor = "black", showTitle = TRUE, name = "Chr 16", fontsize = 14, labelPos = "revAlternating",  
                       fontface = "plain", fontface.title = "plain", background.title = "transparent", add53 = TRUE)

Ensembl <- tibble(ensembl = c("ENST00000252951", "ENST00000251595", "ENST00000336906", "ENST00000320868", 
                              "ENST00000396895", "ENST00000330597", "ENST00000650601", "ENST00000335295"),
                  hgnc = c("HBZ", "HBA2", "HBG2", "HBA1", 
                           "HBE1", "HBG1", "HBD", "HBB"), 
                  tx_ids = c("85794", "85798", "65821", "85800", 
                             "65827", "65817", "65813", "65808")) 

Fig6 <- Data %>%
         filter(Version == "gnomADv4.1" & Region == "Joint") %>%
         dplyr::select(Chromosome, Start, End, Ref, Alt) %>%
         makeGRangesFromDataFrame(seqnames.field = "Chromosome", start.field = "Start", end.field = "End", keep.extra.columns = FALSE)

Fig6$score <- rep(1, length(Fig6))

Gene <- GeneRegionTrack(genes, 
                        genome = "hg38", 
                        chromosome = as.character(unique(seqnames(Fig6))),
                        name = "", 
                        fill = "grey30",
                        col = "transparent", 
                        transcriptAnnotation = "symbol",
                        col.line = "black",
                        alpha = 0.9, 
                        geneSymbol = FALSE, 
                        showId = TRUE,  
                        fontface.group = 1, 
                        fontcolor.group = "grey30", 
                        background.title = "white",
                        size = 1, 
                        fontsize = 20,  
                        fontsize.group = 20,
                        fontface.group = "bold",  
                        fontface.item = "bold")

displayPars(Gene) <- list(fill = "grey30", 
                          col = "grey30",
                          thinBoxFeature = c("utr5", "utr3"), 
                          utr5 = list(fill = "grey70"),   
                          utr3 = list(fill = "grey70"),  
                          col.line = "grey30")

symbol(Gene) <- Ensembl[match(symbol(Gene), Ensembl$ensembl), 'hgnc'][[1]]

values(Fig6) <- Data %>%
                filter(Version == "gnomADv4.1" & Region == "Joint") %>%
                dplyr::select(Chromosome, Start, End, Ref, Alt, Quality) %>%
                mutate(Quality = ifelse(Quality == "Passed", "Pass", "Fail")) %>% 
                dplyr::select(Quality) 

Genes$Fail <- countOverlaps(Genes, Fig6[values(Fig6)$Quality == 'Fail'])
Genes$Pass <- countOverlaps(Genes, Fig6[values(Fig6)$Quality == 'Pass'])

F11 <- DataTrack(Genes[seqnames(Genes) == 11, 1], name = "Fail", 
                 col = "#440154", fill = "#440154", fill.histogram = "#440154",
                 type = c("histogram"), lwd = 0.5, alpha = 0.7)
P11 <- DataTrack(Genes[seqnames(Genes) == 11, 2], name = "Pass", 
                 col = "#35B779", fill = "#35B779", fill.histogram = "#35B779",
                 type = c("histogram"), lwd = 0.5, alpha = 0.7)

F16 <- DataTrack(Genes[seqnames(Genes) == 16, 1], name = "Fail", 
                 col = "#440154", fill = "#440154", fill.histogram = "#440154",
                 type = c("histogram"), lwd = 0.5, alpha =0.7)
P16 <- DataTrack(Genes[seqnames(Genes) == 16, 2], name = "Pass", 
                 col = "#35B779", fill = "#35B779", fill.histogram = "#35B779",
                 type = c("histogram"), lwd = 0.5, alpha = 0.7)

PNG <- function(Gen, Chr, Start, End, Locus, GeneTrack, FailTrack, PassTrack, Path) {png(Path, width = 1000, height = 500, res = 120, pointsize = 12)
                                                                                     chromosome(GeneTrack) <- Chr
                                                                                     chromosome(FailTrack) <- Chr
                                                                                     chromosome(PassTrack) <- Chr

                                                                                     FailTrack <- subset(FailTrack, from = Start, to = End)
                                                                                     PassTrack <- subset(PassTrack, from = Start, to = End)
                                                                                                       
                                                                                     Spacer <- AnnotationTrack(start = Start, end = End, chromosome = Chr, genome = "hg38", name = "")
                                                                                     displayPars(Spacer) <- list(col = "transparent", fill = "transparent", showTitle = FALSE, showAxis = FALSE)
                                                                                                       
                                                                                     tracks <- list(Locus, GeneTrack, FailTrack, Spacer, PassTrack)
                                                                                                       
                                                                                     sizes <- c(0.15,0.1,0.33,0.06,0.33)
                                                                                                       
                                                                                     plotTracks(tracks,
                                                                                                from = Start,
                                                                                                to = End,
                                                                                                sizes = sizes,
                                                                                                cex.axis = 0.8,
                                                                                                cex.legend = 1,
                                                                                                lwd.axis = 1,
                                                                                                fontsize.title = 18, 
                                                                                                title.width = 1.5,
                                                                                                fontfamily = "Arial",
                                                                                                col.axis = "black",
                                                                                                col.title = "black",
                                                                                                background.title = "transparent")
                                                                                     dev.off()}

Panels <- list(list("HBA2", "16", 172700, 173900, C16, Gene, F16, P16),
               list("HBA1", "16", 176500, 177600, C16, Gene, F16, P16),
               list("HBB", "11", 5225300, 5227200, C11, Gene, F11, P11),
               list("HBD", "11", 5232700, 5234600, C11, Gene, F11, P11),
               list("HBE1", "11", 5268100, 5270100, C11, Gene, F11, P11),
               list("HBG1", "11", 5248100, 5250000, C11, Gene, F11, P11),
               list("HBG2", "11", 5253000, 5254900, C11, Gene, F11, P11),
               list("HBZ", "16", 152500, 154600, C16, Gene, F16, P16))

Figure <- c()
for (i in seq_along(Panels)) {Panel <- Panels[[i]]
                              File <- file.path(tempdir(), paste0("Panel_", i, ".png"))
                              PNG(Panel[[1]], Panel[[2]], Panel[[3]], Panel[[4]], Panel[[5]], Panel[[6]], Panel[[7]], Panel[[8]], File)
                              Figure[i] <- File}

Wrap <- lapply(Figure, function(x) {rasterGrob(readPNG(x), interpolate = TRUE)})

png("Fig6A.png",
    units = "in", res = 300, width = 6.3, height = 9.7)
grid.arrange(grobs = c(Wrap[1:3]), nrow = 3, ncol = 1, heights = c(1, 1, 1),
             left = textGrob("Number of variants", rot = 90, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold", family = "Arial")))
dev.off()

png("Fig6B.png",
    units = "in", res = 300, width = 6.3, height = 9.7)
grid.arrange(grobs = c(Wrap[4:6]), nrow = 3, ncol = 1, heights = c(1, 1, 1),
             left = textGrob("Number of variants", rot = 90, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold", family = "Arial")))
dev.off()

png("Fig6C.png",
    units = "in", res = 300, width = 6.3, height = 9.7)
grid.arrange(grobs = c(Wrap[7:8]), nrow = 2, ncol = 1, heights = c(1, 1),
             left = textGrob("Number of variants", rot = 90, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold", family = "Arial")))
dev.off()

file.remove(Figure)

rm(Genes, C11, C16, Ensembl, Gene, Figure, PNG, Panels, Panel, Wrap, File, i, F11, P11, F16, P16)
```


# Supplementary Figure 2: Distribution of gnomADv4.1 release variants passing quality assessment that are unique to a single genetic ancestry group across loci
```{r Fig7}
Genes <- unlist(GRangesList((unlist(GRangesList(lapply((exonsBy(genes, "tx", use.names = TRUE)), function(x){unlist(tile(x, width = 3))})))), 
                            (unlist(GRangesList(lapply((intronsByTranscript(genes, use.names = TRUE)), function(x){unlist(tile(x, width = 5))}))))))

strand(Genes) <- "*"
options(ucscChromosomeNames = FALSE)

C11 <- GenomeAxisTrack(col = "black", lwd = 1, fontcolor = "black", showTitle = TRUE, name = "Chr 11", fontsize = 15, labelPos = "revAlternating",   
                       fontface = "plain", fontface.title = "plain", background.title = "transparent", add35 = TRUE)
C16 <- GenomeAxisTrack(col = "black", lwd = 1, fontcolor = "black", showTitle = TRUE, name = "Chr 16", fontsize = 15, labelPos = "revAlternating",   
                       fontface = "plain", fontface.title = "plain", background.title = "transparent", add53 = TRUE)

Ensembl <- tibble(ensembl = c("ENST00000252951", "ENST00000251595", "ENST00000336906", "ENST00000320868", 
                              "ENST00000396895", "ENST00000330597", "ENST00000650601", "ENST00000335295"),
                  hgnc = c("HBZ", "HBA2", "HBG2", "HBA1", 
                           "HBE1", "HBG1", "HBD", "HBB"), 
                  tx_ids = c("85794", "85798", "65821", "85800", 
                             "65827", "65817", "65813", "65808")) 

Fig7 <- Data %>%
         filter(Version == "gnomADv4.1" & Region == "Joint" & Quality == "Passed") %>%
         dplyr::select(Chromosome, Gene, Start, End, Ref, Alt, Allele.Count_AFR, Allele.Count_AMI, 
                               Allele.Count_AMR, Allele.Count_ASJ, Allele.Count_EAS, Allele.Count_FIN, 
                               Allele.Count_MID, Allele.Count_NFE, Allele.Count_SAS, Allele.Count_OTH) %>%
         pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("Allele.Count_"),
                      names_to = "Ancestry",
                      names_prefix = "Allele.Count_",
                      values_to = "Allele_Count") %>%
         filter(Allele_Count != 0 & !is.na(Allele_Count)) %>%
         mutate(ID = paste(Chromosome, Start, Ref, Alt, sep = "_")) %>%
         group_by(ID) %>%
         mutate(Count = n()) %>%
         ungroup() %>%
         filter(Count == 1) %>%
         dplyr::select(Chromosome, Start, End, Ref, Alt) %>%
         makeGRangesFromDataFrame(seqnames.field = "Chromosome", start.field = "Start", end.field = "End", keep.extra.columns = FALSE)

Fig7$score <- rep(1, length(Fig7))

Gene <- GeneRegionTrack(genes, 
                        genome = "hg38", 
                        chromosome = as.character(unique(seqnames(Fig7))),
                        name = "", 
                        fill = "grey30",
                        col = "transparent", 
                        transcriptAnnotation = "symbol",
                        col.line = "black",
                        alpha = 0.9, 
                        geneSymbol = FALSE, 
                        showId = TRUE,  
                        fontface.group = 1, 
                        fontcolor.group = "grey30", 
                        background.title = "white",
                        size = 1, 
                        fontsize = 20,
                        fontsize.group = 20,
                        fontface.group = "bold",  
                        fontface.item = "bold")

displayPars(Gene) <- list(fill = "grey30", 
                          col = "grey30",
                          thinBoxFeature = c("utr5", "utr3"), 
                          utr5 = list(fill = "grey70"),   
                          utr3 = list(fill = "grey70"),  
                          col.line = "grey30")

symbol(Gene) <- Ensembl[match(symbol(Gene), Ensembl$ensembl), 'hgnc'][[1]]

values(Fig7) <- Data %>%
                 filter(Version == "gnomADv4.1" & Region == "Joint" & Quality == "Passed") %>%
                 dplyr::select(Chromosome, Gene, Start, End, Ref, Alt, Allele.Count_AFR, Allele.Count_AMI, 
                               Allele.Count_AMR, Allele.Count_ASJ, Allele.Count_EAS, Allele.Count_FIN, 
                               Allele.Count_MID, Allele.Count_NFE, Allele.Count_SAS, Allele.Count_OTH) %>%
                 pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("Allele.Count_"),
                              names_to = "Ancestry",
                              names_prefix = "Allele.Count_",
                              values_to = "Allele_Count") %>%
                 filter(Allele_Count != 0 & !is.na(Allele_Count)) %>%
                 mutate(ID = paste(Chromosome, Start, Ref, Alt, sep = "_")) %>%
                 group_by(ID) %>%
                 mutate(Count = n()) %>%
                 ungroup() %>%
                 filter(Count == 1) %>%
                 dplyr::select(Ancestry)

Genes$NFE <- countOverlaps(Genes, Fig7[values(Fig7)$Ancestry == 'NFE'])
Genes$SAS <- countOverlaps(Genes, Fig7[values(Fig7)$Ancestry == 'SAS'])
Genes$AFR <- countOverlaps(Genes, Fig7[values(Fig7)$Ancestry == 'AFR'])
Genes$FIN <- countOverlaps(Genes, Fig7[values(Fig7)$Ancestry == 'FIN'])
Genes$OTH <- countOverlaps(Genes, Fig7[values(Fig7)$Ancestry == 'OTH'])
Genes$AMR <- countOverlaps(Genes, Fig7[values(Fig7)$Ancestry == 'AMR'])
Genes$EAS <- countOverlaps(Genes, Fig7[values(Fig7)$Ancestry == 'EAS'])
Genes$ASJ <- countOverlaps(Genes, Fig7[values(Fig7)$Ancestry == 'ASJ'])
Genes$MID <- countOverlaps(Genes, Fig7[values(Fig7)$Ancestry == 'MID'])
Genes$AMI <- countOverlaps(Genes, Fig7[values(Fig7)$Ancestry == 'AMI'])

ID11 <- as.character(seqnames(Genes)) == "11"
ID16 <- as.character(seqnames(Genes)) == "16"

DT11 <- DataTrack(range = Genes[ID11],
                  data  = t(as.matrix(mcols(Genes)[, rev(c("NFE","SAS","AFR","FIN","OTH","AMR","EAS","ASJ","MID","AMI"))]))[, ID11, drop = FALSE],
                  type  = "heatmap",
                  name  = "Number of variants", showTitle = FALSE)

DT16 <- DataTrack(range = Genes[ID16],
                  data  = t(as.matrix(mcols(Genes)[, rev(c("NFE","SAS","AFR","FIN","OTH","AMR","EAS","ASJ","MID","AMI"))]))[, ID16, drop = FALSE],
                  type  = "heatmap",
                  name  = "Number of variants", showTitle = FALSE)

PNG <- function(Gen, Chr, Start, End, Locus, DT, Path, R = NULL){png(Path, width = 1000, height = 500, res = 120, pointsize = 14)
  
                                                                 chromosome(Gene) <- Chr
                                                                                   
                                                                 tracks <- list(Locus, Gene, DT)
                                                                                   
                                                                 sizes <- c(0.1,0.08,0.82)
                                                                                   
                                                                 plotTracks(tracks, 
                                                                            from = Start, 
                                                                            to = End, 
                                                                            sizes = sizes,
                                                                            ylim = c(0,6), 
                                                                            fontfamily = "Arial", 
                                                                            gradient = c("transparent", "grey", "#440154", "#2A788E", "#35B779", "#73D055"),
                                                                            cex.axis = 0.7,
                                                                            lwd.axis = 0.5,
                                                                            fontsize.title = 18,
                                                                            col.axis = "black",
                                                                            col.title = "black",
                                                                            background.title = "transparent")
                                                                 
                                                                 if(!is.null(R)){nrows <- length(R)
                                                                                 for(i in seq_along(R)){grid.rect(x = unit(0.1, "npc"),
                                                                                                                  y = unit(0.77 - (i - 0.5) * 0.0725, "npc"),
                                                                                                                  width = unit(1.5, "char"),
                                                                                                                  height = unit(1.25, "lines"),
                                                                                                                  gp = gpar(fill = "grey90", col = "black", lwd = 0.6))
                                                                                   
                                                                                                        grid.text(label = R[i],
                                                                                                                  x = unit(0.113, "npc"),
                                                                                                                  y = unit(0.77 - (i - 0.5) * 0.0725, "npc"),
                                                                                                                  just = "right",
                                                                                                                  gp = gpar(fontsize = 8, fontfamily = "Arial", col = "black", fontface = "bold"))}}
                                                                 dev.off()}

Panels <- list(list("HBA2", "16", 172700, 173900, C16, DT16),
               list("HBA1", "16", 176500, 177600, C16, DT16),
               list("HBB", "11", 5225300, 5227200, C11, DT11),
               list("HBD", "11", 5232700, 5234600, C11, DT11),
               list("HBE1", "11", 5268100, 5270100, C11, DT11),
               list("HBG1", "11", 5248100, 5250000, C11, DT11),
               list("HBG2", "11", 5253000, 5254900, C11, DT11),
               list("HBZ", "16", 152500, 154600, C16, DT16))

Figure <- c()
for(i in seq_along(Panels)){Panel <- Panels[[i]]
                            File <- file.path(tempdir(), paste0("Panel_", i, ".png"))
                            PNG(Panel[[1]], Panel[[2]], Panel[[3]], Panel[[4]], Panel[[5]], Panel[[6]], File, R = rev(c("NFE","SAS","AFR","FIN","OTH","AMR","EAS","ASJ","MID","AMI")))
                            Figure[i] <- File}

Wrap <- lapply(Figure, function(x) {rasterGrob(readPNG(x), interpolate = TRUE)})

png("Fig7A.png",
    units = "in", res = 300, width = 6.3, height = 9.7)
grid.arrange(grobs = c(Wrap[1:3]), nrow = 3, ncol = 1, heights = c(1, 1, 1),
             left = textGrob("Number of variants", rot = 90, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold", family = "Arial")))
dev.off()

png("Fig7B.png",
    units = "in", res = 300, width = 6.3, height = 9.7)
grid.arrange(grobs = c(Wrap[4:6]), nrow = 3, ncol = 1, heights = c(1, 1, 1),
             left = textGrob("Number of variants", rot = 90, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold", family = "Arial")))
dev.off()

png("Fig7C.png",
    units = "in", res = 300, width = 6.3, height = 9.7)
grid.arrange(grobs = c(Wrap[7:8]), nrow = 2, ncol = 1, heights = c(1, 1),
             left = textGrob("Number of variants", rot = 90, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold", family = "Arial")))
dev.off()

file.remove(Figure)

rm(Genes, C11, C16, DT11, DT16, ID11, ID16, Ensembl, Gene, Figure, PNG, Panels, Panel, Wrap, File, i)
```

# Supplementary Figure 3: Distribution of gnomADv4.1 release variants passing quality assessment with BA1, BS1, BS2, BS2_Supporting and PM2_Supporting evidence across loci
```{r Fig8}
Genes <- unlist(GRangesList((unlist(GRangesList(lapply((exonsBy(genes, "tx", use.names = TRUE)), function(x){unlist(tile(x, width = 3))})))), 
                            (unlist(GRangesList(lapply((intronsByTranscript(genes, use.names = TRUE)), function(x){unlist(tile(x, width = 5))}))))))

strand(Genes) <- "*"
options(ucscChromosomeNames = FALSE)

C11 <- GenomeAxisTrack(col = "black", lwd = 1, fontcolor = "black", showTitle = TRUE, name = "Chr 11", fontsize = 15, labelPos = "revAlternating",   
                       fontface = "plain", fontface.title = "plain", background.title = "transparent", add35 = TRUE)
C16 <- GenomeAxisTrack(col = "black", lwd = 1, fontcolor = "black", showTitle = TRUE, name = "Chr 16", fontsize = 15, labelPos = "revAlternating",  
                       fontface = "plain", fontface.title = "plain", background.title = "transparent", add53 = TRUE)

Ensembl <- tibble(ensembl = c("ENST00000252951", "ENST00000251595", "ENST00000336906", "ENST00000320868", 
                              "ENST00000396895", "ENST00000330597", "ENST00000650601", "ENST00000335295"),
                  hgnc = c("HBZ", "HBA2", "HBG2", "HBA1", 
                           "HBE1", "HBG1", "HBD", "HBB"), 
                  tx_ids = c("85794", "85798", "65821", "85800", 
                             "65827", "65817", "65813", "65808")) 

Fig8 <- Data1 %>% 
        dplyr::select(Chromosome, Start, End, Ref, Alt, BA1, BS1, BS2, BS2_Supporting, PM2_Supporting) %>%
        pivot_longer(cols = c(BA1, BS1, BS2, BS2_Supporting, PM2_Supporting),
                     names_to = "Category", values_to = "Response") %>%
        filter(Response == "Satisfied") %>%
        dplyr::select(Chromosome, Start, End, Ref, Alt) %>%
        makeGRangesFromDataFrame(seqnames.field = "Chromosome", start.field = "Start", end.field = "End", keep.extra.columns = FALSE)

Fig8$score <- rep(1, length(Fig8))

Gene <- GeneRegionTrack(genes, 
                        genome = "hg38", 
                        chromosome = as.character(unique(seqnames(Fig8))),
                        name = "", 
                        fill = "grey30",
                        col = "transparent", 
                        transcriptAnnotation = "symbol",
                        col.line = "black",
                        alpha = 0.9, 
                        geneSymbol = FALSE, 
                        showId = TRUE,  
                        fontface.group = 1, 
                        fontcolor.group = "grey30", 
                        background.title = "white",
                        size = 1, 
                        fontsize = 17,
                        fontsize.group = 17,
                        fontface.group = "bold",  
                        fontface.item = "bold")

displayPars(Gene) <- list(fill = "grey30", 
                          col = "grey30",
                          thinBoxFeature = c("utr5", "utr3"), 
                          utr5 = list(fill = "grey70"),   
                          utr3 = list(fill = "grey70"),  
                          col.line = "grey30")

symbol(Gene) <- Ensembl[match(symbol(Gene), Ensembl$ensembl), 'hgnc'][[1]]

values(Fig8) <- Data1 %>% 
                dplyr::select(Chromosome, Start, End, Ref, Alt, BA1, BS1, BS2, BS2_Supporting, PM2_Supporting) %>%
                pivot_longer(cols = c(BA1, BS1, BS2, BS2_Supporting, PM2_Supporting),
                             names_to = "Category", values_to = "Response") %>%
                filter(Response == "Satisfied") %>%
                dplyr::select(Category)

Genes$BA1 <- countOverlaps(Genes, Fig8[values(Fig8)$Category == 'BA1'])
Genes$BS1 <- countOverlaps(Genes, Fig8[values(Fig8)$Category == 'BS1'])
Genes$BS2 <- countOverlaps(Genes, Fig8[values(Fig8)$Category == 'BS2'])
Genes$BS2_Supporting <- countOverlaps(Genes, Fig8[values(Fig8)$Category == 'BS2_Supporting'])
Genes$PM2_Supporting <- countOverlaps(Genes, Fig8[values(Fig8)$Category == 'PM2_Supporting'])

BA111 <- DataTrack(Genes[seqnames(Genes) == 11, 1], name = "BA1",
                   col = "#35B779", fill = "#35B779", fill.histogram = "#35B779",
                   type = c("S"), lwd = 1.5)
BS111 <- DataTrack(Genes[seqnames(Genes) == 11, 2], name = "BS1",
                   col = "#73D055", fill = "#73D055", fill.histogram = "#73D055",
                   type = c("S"), lwd = 1.5)
BS211 <- DataTrack(Genes[seqnames(Genes) == 11, 3], name = "BS2",
                   col = "#2A788E", fill = "#2A788E", fill.histogram = "#2A788E",
                   type = c("S"), lwd = 1.5)
BS2S11 <- DataTrack(Genes[seqnames(Genes) == 11, 4], name = "BS2*", 
                    col = "#414487", fill = "#414487", fill.histogram = "#414487",
                    type = c("S"), lwd = 1.5)
PM211 <- DataTrack(Genes[seqnames(Genes) == 11, 5], name = "PM2*", 
                   col = "#440154", fill = "#440154", fill.histogram = "#440154",
                   type = c("S"),lwd = 1.5)

BA116 <- DataTrack(Genes[seqnames(Genes) == 16, 1], name = "BA1",
                   col = "#35B779", fill = "#35B779", fill.histogram = "#35B779",
                   type = c("S"), lwd = 1.5)
BS116 <- DataTrack(Genes[seqnames(Genes) == 16, 2], name = "BS1",
                   col = "#73D055", fill = "#73D055", fill.histogram = "#73D055",
                   type = c("S"), lwd = 1.5)
BS216 <- DataTrack(Genes[seqnames(Genes) == 16, 3], name = "BS2",
                   col = "#2A788E", fill = "#2A788E", fill.histogram = "#2A788E",
                   type = c("S"), lwd = 1.5)
BS2S16 <- DataTrack(Genes[seqnames(Genes) == 16, 4], name = "BS2*",
                    col = "#414487", fill = "#414487", fill.histogram = "#414487",
                    type = c("S"), lwd = 1.5)
PM216 <- DataTrack(Genes[seqnames(Genes) == 16, 5], name = "PM2*", 
                   col = "#440154", fill = "#440154", fill.histogram = "#440154",
                   type = c("S"), lwd = 1.5)

Figure <- c()
PNG <- function(Gen, Chr, Start, End, Locus, BA1, BS1, BS2, BS2S, PM2, Path){png(Path, width = 1000, height = 500, res = 120, pointsize = 20)
  
                                                                             chromosome(Gene) <- Chr
                                                                                               
                                                                             Spacer <- AnnotationTrack(start = 0, end = 1, chromosome = "1", genome = "hg38", name = "")
                                                                             displayPars(Spacer) <- list(col = "transparent", fill = "transparent", showTitle = FALSE, showAxis = FALSE)
                                                                                               
                                                                             tracks <- list(Locus, Gene, BA1, Spacer, BS1, Spacer, BS2, Spacer, BS2S, Spacer, PM2)
                                                                                               
                                                                             sizes <- c(0.12,0.08,0.17,0.02,0.17,0.02,0.17,0.02,0.17,0.02,0.17)
                                                                                               
                                                                             plotTracks(tracks, 
                                                                                        from = Start, 
                                                                                        to = End, 
                                                                                        sizes = sizes,
                                                                                        ylim = c(0,10), 
                                                                                        cex.axis = 0.55, 
                                                                                        lwd.axis = 0.5, 
                                                                                        fontsize.title = 18, 
                                                                                        title.width = 1.5,
                                                                                        fontfamily = "Arial",
                                                                                        fontface = "plain",
                                                                                        fontface.title = "plain", 
                                                                                        col.axis = "black",
                                                                                        col.title = "black",
                                                                                        background.title = "transparent")
                                                                             dev.off()}

Panels <- list(list("HBA2", "16", 172700, 173900, C16, BA116, BS116, BS216, BS2S16, PM216),
               list("HBA1", "16", 176500, 177600, C16, BA116, BS116, BS216, BS2S16, PM216),
               list("HBB", "11", 5225300, 5227200, C11, BA111, BS111, BS211, BS2S11, PM211),
               list("HBD", "11", 5232700, 5234600, C11, BA111, BS111, BS211, BS2S11, PM211),
               list("HBE1", "11", 5268100, 5270100, C11, BA111, BS111, BS211, BS2S11, PM211),
               list("HBG1", "11", 5248100, 5250000, C11, BA111, BS111, BS211, BS2S11, PM211),
               list("HBG2", "11", 5253000, 5254900, C11, BA111, BS111, BS211, BS2S11, PM211),
               list("HBZ", "16", 152500, 154600, C16, BA116, BS116, BS216, BS2S16, PM216))

for (i in seq_along(Panels)) {Panel <- Panels[[i]]
                              File <- file.path(tempdir(), paste0("Panel_", i, ".png"))
                              PNG(Panel[[1]], Panel[[2]], Panel[[3]], Panel[[4]], Panel[[5]], Panel[[6]], Panel[[7]], Panel[[8]], Panel[[9]], Panel[[10]], File)
                              Figure[i] <- File}

Wrap <- lapply(Figure, function(x) {rasterGrob(readPNG(x), interpolate = TRUE)})

png("Fig8A.png",
    units = "in", res = 300, width = 6.3, height = 9.7)
grid.arrange(grobs = c(Wrap[1:3]), nrow = 3, ncol = 1, heights = c(1, 1, 1),
             left = textGrob("Number of variants", rot = 90, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold", family = "Arial")))

dev.off()

png("Fig8B.png",
    units = "in", res = 300, width = 6.3, height = 9.7)
grid.arrange(grobs = c(Wrap[4:6]), nrow = 3, ncol = 1, heights = c(1, 1, 1),
             left = textGrob("Number of variants", rot = 90, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold", family = "Arial")))
dev.off()

png("Fig8C.png",
    units = "in", res = 300, width = 6.3, height = 9.7)
grid.arrange(grobs = c(Wrap[7:8]), nrow = 2, ncol = 1, heights = c(1, 1),
             left = textGrob("Number of variants", rot = 90, gp = gpar(fontsize = 14, fontface = "bold", family = "Arial")))
dev.off()
file.remove(Figure)

rm(Genes, C11, C16, BA111, BS111, BS211, BS2S11, PM211, BA116, BS116, BS216, BS2S16, PM216, Ensembl, Gene, Figure, PNG, Panels, Panel, Wrap, File, i)
```

# Overview of variants passing quality assessment unique to GnomADv2.0 satisfaction of ACMG/AMP criteria
```{r v2unique}
v2_Unique <- Data %>%
             mutate(ID = paste(Chromosome, Start, Ref, Alt, sep = "_")) %>%
             filter(Version == "gnomADv2.1.1") %>%
             semi_join(Data %>%
                       filter(Region != "Joint") %>%
                       mutate(ID = paste(Chromosome, Start, Ref, Alt, sep = "_"),
                              Region = factor(Region, levels = c("Exome", "Genome")),
                              Version = factor(Version, levels = c("gnomADv2.1.1", "gnomADv4.1")),
                              Quality = ifelse(Quality == "Passed", "Pass", "Fail"),
                              Quality = factor(Quality, levels = c("Pass", "Fail"))) %>%
                       dplyr::select(ID, Version, Region, Quality) %>%
                       pivot_wider(names_from = Version,
                                   values_from = Quality,
                                   names_prefix = "Q_",
                                   values_fn = list(Quality = dplyr::first),
                                   values_fill = list(Quality = NA_character_)) %>%
                       mutate(Category = case_when(!is.na(Q_gnomADv2.1.1) & !is.na(Q_gnomADv4.1) ~ "Common to both releases",
                                                   !is.na(Q_gnomADv2.1.1) &  is.na(Q_gnomADv4.1) ~ "Unique to gnomADv2.1.1",
                                                   is.na(Q_gnomADv2.1.1) & !is.na(Q_gnomADv4.1) ~ "Unique to gnomADv4.1"),
                              Quality = case_when(Category == "Common to both releases" & Q_gnomADv2.1.1 == "Pass" & Q_gnomADv4.1 == "Pass" ~ "Pass",
                                                  Category == "Common to both releases" & Q_gnomADv2.1.1 == "Fail" & Q_gnomADv4.1 == "Fail" ~ "Fail",
                                                  Category == "Common to both releases" & Q_gnomADv2.1.1 == "Pass" & Q_gnomADv4.1 == "Fail" ~ "Pass → Fail",
                                                  Category == "Common to both releases" & Q_gnomADv2.1.1 == "Fail" & Q_gnomADv4.1 == "Pass" ~ "Fail → Pass",
                                                  Category == "Unique to gnomADv2.1.1" & Q_gnomADv2.1.1 == "Pass" ~ "Pass",
                                                  Category == "Unique to gnomADv2.1.1" & Q_gnomADv2.1.1 == "Fail" ~ "Fail",
                                                  Category == "Unique to gnomADv4.1" & Q_gnomADv4.1 == "Pass" ~ "Pass",
                                                  Category == "Unique to gnomADv4.1" & Q_gnomADv4.1 == "Fail" ~ "Fail", TRUE ~ "Other")) %>%
                       filter(Quality != "Other") %>%  
                       filter(Category == "Unique to gnomADv2.1.1" & Quality == "Pass"), by = "ID")

v2_Unique

v2_Unique <- v2_Unique %>% 
             filter(Version == "gnomADv2.1.1" & Region != "Joint" & Quality == "Passed") %>%
             rowwise() %>%
             mutate(FAF95_MAX = max(c(FAF95_AFR, 
                                      FAF95_AMR, 
                                      FAF95_EAS, 
                                      FAF95_NFE, 
                                      FAF95_SAS), na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
             mutate(FAF95_MAXETH = {Index <- which(c(FAF95_AFR, 
                                                     FAF95_AMR, 
                                                     FAF95_EAS, 
                                                     FAF95_NFE, 
                                                     FAF95_SAS) == max(c(FAF95_AFR, 
                                                                         FAF95_AMR,
                                                                         FAF95_EAS, 
                                                                         FAF95_NFE, 
                                                                         FAF95_SAS), na.rm = TRUE))
                                    if (length(Index) == 1) {c("AFR", "AMR", "EAS", "NFE", "SAS")[Index]} 
             
                                    # In cases of tied max FAF95, report FAF95 with greatest variant count
                                    else {Index2 <- Index[which(c(Allele.Count_AFR,
                                                                  Allele.Count_AMR, 
                                                                  Allele.Count_EAS, 
                                                                  Allele.Count_NFE, 
                                                                  Allele.Count_SAS)[Index] == max(c(Allele.Count_AFR,
                                                                                                    Allele.Count_AMR,
                                                                                                    Allele.Count_EAS,
                                                                                                    Allele.Count_NFE, 
                                                                                                    Allele.Count_SAS)[Index], na.rm = TRUE))]
                                    if (length(Index2) == 1) {c("AFR", "AMR", "EAS", "NFE", "SAS")[Index2]} 
                                    
                                    # In cases of tied max FAF95 & allele count, report FAF95 with greatest number of alleles tested
                                    else {Max <- max(c(Allele.Total_AFR,
                                                       Allele.Total_AMR, 
                                                       Allele.Total_EAS, 
                                                       Allele.Total_NFE, 
                                                       Allele.Total_SAS)[Index2], na.rm = TRUE)
                                    
                                    c("AFR",
                                      "AMR",
                                      "EAS",
                                      "NFE", 
                                      "SAS")[Index2[which.max(c(Allele.Total_AFR, 
                                                                Allele.Total_AMR, 
                                                                Allele.Total_EAS,
                                                                Allele.Total_NFE,
                                                                Allele.Total_SAS)[Index2])]]}}}) %>%
         ungroup() %>%
         mutate(Count = case_when(FAF95_MAXETH == "AFR" ~ Allele.Count_AFR,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "AMR" ~ Allele.Count_AMR,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "EAS" ~ Allele.Count_EAS,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "NFE" ~ Allele.Count_NFE,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "SAS" ~ Allele.Count_SAS,
                                  TRUE ~ NA_integer_),
                Total = case_when(FAF95_MAXETH == "AFR" ~ Allele.Total_AFR,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "AMR" ~ Allele.Total_AMR,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "EAS" ~ Allele.Total_EAS,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "NFE" ~ Allele.Total_NFE,
                                  FAF95_MAXETH == "SAS" ~ Allele.Total_SAS,
                                  TRUE ~ NA_integer_)) %>%
         group_by(Chromosome, Gene, Start, Ref, Alt) %>%
         mutate(Allele.Frequency_ALL = max(Allele.Frequency_ALL, na.rm = TRUE),
                Homozygotes_ALL = max(Homozygotes_ALL, na.rm = TRUE),
                FAF95_MAX = max(FAF95_MAX, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
         slice_max(order_by = FAF95_MAX, with_ties = FALSE) %>% 
         ungroup() %>%
         dplyr::select(Chromosome, Gene, Start, End, Ref, Alt, Allele.Frequency_ALL, Homozygotes_ALL, FAF95_MAX, Count, Total, ClinVar, Stars, Quality) %>%
         distinct() %>%
         mutate(BA1 = ifelse(Total >= 2000 & Count >= 5 & FAF95_MAX >= 0.005, "Satisfied", "Not satisfied"), # 95% MAX FAF >= 0.005 (0.5%) where allele total >= 2000 & allele count >= 5
                BS1 = ifelse(Total >= 2000 & Count >= 5 & FAF95_MAX >= 0.001 & FAF95_MAX < 0.005, "Satisfied", "Not satisfied"), # 95% MAX FAF >= 0.001 (0.1%) where allele total >= 2000 & allele count >= 5 [Exlcudes BA1 range]
                PM2_Supporting = ifelse(Allele.Frequency_ALL < 0.0001, "Satisfied", "Not satisfied"),        # ALL AF < 0.0001 (0.01%)
                BS2 = ifelse(Homozygotes_ALL >= 2, "Satisfied", "Not satisfied"),                            # 2 >= Homozygotes
                BS2_Supporting = ifelse(Homozygotes_ALL == 1, "Satisfied", "Not satisfied"),                 # 1 == Homozygote
                Conflict_BS2_PM2 = ifelse(Homozygotes_ALL >= 2 & Allele.Frequency_ALL < 0.0001, "Satisfied", "Not satisfied"), # Meets both criteria [evidence for benign & pathogenic]
                Conflict_BS1_PM2 = ifelse(Total >= 2000 & Count >= 5 & FAF95_MAX >= 0.001 & FAF95_MAX < 0.005 & Allele.Frequency_ALL < 0.0001, "Satisfied", "Not satisfied")) %>%  # Meets both criteria [evidence for benign & pathogenic]
        mutate(ClinVar = ifelse(ClinVar == "Uncertain_significance", "Uncertain significance", 
                         ifelse(ClinVar == "Pathogenic/Likely_pathogenic", "Pathogenic/Likely pathogenic", 
                         ifelse(ClinVar == "Likely_benign", "Benign/Likely benign", 
                         ifelse(ClinVar == "Benign/Likely_benign", "Benign/Likely benign", 
                         ifelse(ClinVar == "other", "Uncertain significance", 
                         ifelse(ClinVar == "Likely_pathogenic", "Pathogenic/Likely pathogenic", 
                         ifelse(ClinVar == "Benign", "Benign/Likely benign",
                         ifelse(ClinVar == "Pathogenic|other", "Uncertain significance", 
                         ifelse(ClinVar == "Conflicting_classifications_of_pathogenicity", "Uncertain significance",
                         ifelse(ClinVar == "Pathogenic", "Pathogenic/Likely pathogenic", NA))))))))))) %>%
        mutate(ID = paste(Chromosome, Start, End, Ref, Alt, sep = "_"))  

v2_Unique
```

# GnomADv4.1 release variants passing quality assessment satisfying conflicting ACMG/AMP criteria
```{r conflictvar}
Conflict <- Data1 %>%
            mutate(ID = paste(Chromosome, Start, Ref, Alt, sep = "_")) %>%
            filter(Conflict_BS2_PM2 == "Satisfied" | Conflict_BS1_PM2 == "Satisfied") %>%
            dplyr::select(-ID, -BA1, -BS2_Supporting, -Homozygotes_ALL, -Count, -Total, -Conflict_BS2_PM2, -Conflict_BS1_PM2, -Stars) %>%
            dplyr::select(Chromosome, Gene, Start, End, Ref, Alt, ClinVar, FAF95_MAX, Allele.Frequency_ALL, BS1, BS2, PM2_Supporting) %>% 
  arrange(desc(BS1), Chromosome, Gene) %>%
  mutate(Allele.Frequency_ALL = format(Allele.Frequency_ALL, scientific = FALSE),
         ClinVar = ifelse(is.na(ClinVar), "Not available", ClinVar),
         across(everything(), ~ifelse(.x == "Satisfied", "Met", .x)),
         across(everything(), ~ifelse(.x == "Not satisfied", "Not met", .x)))

Conflict
```
